title: (Fluent English) Gaming Support Consultant, RPG (remotely)
locations_alt_raw: Sarajevo, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina, Bosnia and Herzegovina
locations_derived: City of Sarajevo, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina, Bosnia and Herzegovina
description_text:
Who we are?
SupportYourApp is a global Support-as-a-Service leader, collaborating with top-tier tech companies like Mastercard, Calm, and MacPaw since 2010. We operate in 30+ countries and from 90+ countries, and support customers in 60 languages, helping SaaS, software, and hardware brands deliver secure, world-class customer and technical support.
Right now, we’re expanding our talent bench — a pool of skilled Customer Support Consultants who want to grow with us and be the first in line when new projects open.
If you’re ready to join a multicultural, multilingual community and grow professionally while working from home, this could be your next step.
What you will do:
Deliver outstanding customer support via chats and emails
Build strong and lasting customer relationships
Keep up with evolving tools and technology
Handle sensitive customer data with care and security
Apply the latest and greatest customer happiness practices
Maintain deep understanding of client solutions and meet KPI
Communicate with developers and cross-functional specialists
What you need to succeed in this role: 
Excellent English communication skills (at C1 level or higher)
6+ months of experience in a gaming support role
Strong knowledge and passion for role-playing games (RPGs), mobile games, and streaming platforms is a must
Experience providing support via chats and emails in English is a must
CRM systems expertise
Strong analytical thinking and research skills
Positive, proactive and responsible attitude
Personal computer (at least 8Gb of RAM) with a stable internet connection (minimum 50 Mbps–download and 40 Mbps–upload)
Will be a great plus: 
Experience in technical support
What you get in return:
Provide services during flexible hours
Opportunity to cooperate fully remotely
Inclusive international environment
Compensation in USD
Rewards for referring friends
Balance between project workload and personal time, but also – internal health policy
Responsive leadership interested in your development and long-lasting cooperation
Greenhouse conditions for self-development
A culture built on trust, with no time-tracking requirements
If this is about you — let’s get to know each other before 2026 opens its doors. We can simply exchange ideas or talk through the opportunities for our growth together 🚀
*Benefits and conditions may vary depending on the terms of your engagement. Some benefits typically apply to employees; independent contractors may not be eligible for all of them. Final terms will be clearly defined in your agreement if selected.
We adhere to the principles of equal treatment of candidates and prohibit discrimination on any grounds protected by law.
Your personal data will be processed as described in the SupportYourApp Candidate Privacy Notice.
ai_benefits: Balance between project workload and personal time
Responsive leadership interested in your development and long-lasting cooperation

linkedin_org_description:
SupportYourApp is an international Support-as-a-Service company that has been providing secure technical, customer support and CX services to growing companies around the globe since 2010. 

Reasons to count on us:
• Over 15 years of experience
• Over 1200 professionals on a team 
• Over 60 operational languages
• PCI DSS Certified Level 1 Service Provider
• ISO/IEC 27001 certification
• GDPR-, CCPA-, and HIPAA-compliance
• Refined processes of onboarding, learning, and human development
• Customer-focused consultants with exceptional language skills

Our services include, but are not limited to:
• Customer support (Front desk, Tier 1)
• Technical support (Tier 1-3)
• Social media customer service
• CX services
• AI-powered support teams
• System setup and Integration
• Reception desk services
• Back-office services (data entry, content moderation & enrichment)
• KYC and ID verification
• Data annotation
• Staff augmentation (web & software developers, UX/UI designers, QA)

📚 Check out our course on Udemy → https://www.udemy.com/course/customer-support-101-building-excellence/?couponCode=536430084CA64453549A

Every company is different and requires a unique experience. That’s why we have an individual approach and offer a tailored solution to every client.
We are all diverse, but we have one goal — to support people. We support. You grow.

title: Billing Associate
cities_derived: Municipal Unit of Agios Ioannis Rentis
locations_derived: Municipal Unit of Agios Ioannis Rentis, Attica, Greece
description_text:
Company Overview
Sioufas & Associates Law Firm, a leading firm in Greece, is seeking a Billing Associate to join its Legal Services Division at the Athens headquarters. With over 450 professionals, the firm serves top Greek and multinational clients, combining expertise with efficiency and commitment to continuous improvement.
Position Summary
Reporting to the Invoicing Supervisor, the successful candidate will support the timely and accurate issuance of invoices while contributing to data-driven reporting, analysis, and process improvement within the billing function.
Key Responsibilities
Issue service invoices and related legal documents in accordance with company and client requirements.
Support the preparation and digital management of billing schedules and electronic files.
Prepare, maintain, and analyze Excel-based reports to monitor billing progress, trends, and KPIs.
Communicate with internal teams and clients regarding billing inquiries and resolutions.
Assist in improving and automating billing processes using data insights.
Review and organize legal documents relevant to invoicing.
Collect, validate, and digitize billing-related data.
Required Qualifications
University degree (AEI/TEI) or equivalent in Accounting, Finance, Data Analytics, or a related field.
1–3 years of relevant experience in billing, invoicing, or a related analytical role.
Advanced Excel skills (pivot tables, formulas, reporting) and proficiency in MS Office.
Familiarity with CRM/ERP systems (e.g. Atlantis) and e-invoicing processes.
Strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and ability to organize and prioritize tasks effectively.
Preferred Qualifications
Experience in a service-oriented company or law firm.
Knowledge of legal documents or service agreements.
Familiarity with reporting tools or data visualization software.
Professional Skills & Attributes
Organized and results-oriented, with strong time-management skills.
Effective communicator, able to collaborate across different teams.
Reliable and discreet, handling sensitive information with care.
Adaptable in a dynamic work environment and able to maintain performance under pressure.
Competitive remuneration and benefits package.
Bonus upon success.
Private medical insurance.
Formal training and development of your skills.
A place where your professional and personal success is our commitment.

They will also communicate with internal teams and clients regarding billing inquiries and assist in improving billing processes using data insights.

Essential qualifications include advanced Excel skills, proficiency in MS Office, and familiarity with CRM/ERP systems and e-invoicing processes.

Our law firm is committed to long-lasting relationships providing strong and enduring support, and delivering the highest quality service for its clients, within the current, challenging environment. The success of our company is coming from the combination of the following attributes:

title: Specialist, Business Development and Projects
description_text:
Calling all truly AWESOME people! 
About Stranger Soccer 
Stranger Soccer (www.strangersoccer.com) is a Singapore-based company experiencing explosive growth. In a few short years, after launching a revolutionary platform and Mobile App for on-demand football, the company has amassed over 50,000 registered users playing hundreds of games a week. It has solved the problem that football is the world's #1 sport, but is difficult for an individual to play. Stranger Soccer makes it as easy as going to the gym or for a jog. Browse. Book a slot. Show up and play. Today, it is the #1 way people play football and futsal in Singapore, and is rapidly expanding internationally via a license partner model, with locations in Australia, India, USA, UAE, and South Africa. 
Role 
The selected candidate(s) will work closely with the CEO, Executive Director, and a small global team. He or she will be assigned a set of responsibilities in one or more of these areas: License Sales & Support, International Business Development, Ad Hoc Project Management. 
Relevant experience, e.g. business development, administration, project management 
Excellent English communication skills 
Strong attention to detail 
Passion for customer service 
Friendly positive attitude and team player 
Bachelor's Degree/Diploma 
Interest in football is a BIG PLUS 
Experience working overseas or with international companies a PLUS 
Hospitality experience a PLUS 
Franchise Development or Support experience a PLUS 
Other Details 
Position will be virtual (e.g., based in Philippines) with occasional travel to Singapore. 
Pay: Php 30,000 - 40,000 per month
To apply, please send resume to recruitment@strangersoccer.com. Please include cover note and salary expectations.
ai_core_responsibilities: The selected candidate will work closely with the CEO and Executive Director on License Sales & Support, International Business Development, and Ad Hoc Project Management. Responsibilities will involve collaborating with a small global team to drive business growth.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have relevant experience in business development, administration, or project management, along with excellent English communication skills. A Bachelor's Degree or Diploma is required, and an interest in football is a significant plus.
linkedin_org_slogan: Playing Football ⚽️: As easy as going for a jog. Singapore’s #1. Now accepting applications for international licensees.
linkedin_org_locations: 7 Temasek Boulevard, Suntec Tower One, Singapore, 038987, SG
linkedin_org_description:
3.5 billion people in 200 countries love football. Why don't more of them play? 

Stranger Soccer’s acclaimed app-enabled platform makes playing football (soccer, futbol) as easy as going for a jog. 

Singapore born, now open in 10+ cities with 100,000+ games run. Accepting applications for license partners to own and operate Stranger Soccer in key cities around the world.

Interested in bringing Stranger Soccer to your city or country? We are now accepting applications for license partners to own and operate Stranger Soccer in their city. Learn more here: www.strangersoccer.com

title: E-Commerce Executive | Mar-Bella Collection
description_text:
Mar-Bella Collection: A family-owned group of four award winning five-star luxury hotels, dotted around the Ionian Sea in Greece & curated to suit the ever-changing needs of guests across different stages of their life. The iconic MarBella, perfect for families and multi-generational groups, the adults-only Nido, a Small Luxury Hotel of the World, and Avali, the latest addition to the Mar-Bella Collection portfolio are located on the island of Corfu. Elix is on the Ionian coast of mainland Greece and lays in a stunning location above Karavostasi beach between Parga and Syvota.
Mar-Bella Collection is seeking a motivated and detail-oriented E-Commerce Executive to support the growth of direct online revenue across our luxury hotel portfolio. As an E-Commerce Executive at Mar-Bella Collection, you will play a key role in enhancing the performance of our digital sales channels across the hotel portfolio. You will support the growth of direct online revenue while ensuring a seamless and high-quality booking experience that reflects the standards of a luxury hospitality brand. This is a hands-on role, ideal for mid-level professionals with hotel e-commerce experience who want to grow within a premium hospitality group.
Key Responsibilities
· Contribute in increasing turnover through direct online reservations
· Manage rates, room inventory and listings, update content and special offers across all online channels
· Handle OTAs, extranets, and channel connectivity
· Work closely with our digital agency to improve KPIs and conversion through the website
· Support online campaigns, special offers, and mobile/app-related projects
· Monitor performance, prepare reports, and contribute to improving the booking journey and customer experience
· Collaborate with Marketing, Sales, and Reservations teams to ensure accurate pricing and availability
· Previous experience in hotel e-commerce required
· Hands-on experience with OTAs & Channel Management systems is required* 
· Bachelor’s degree in E-Commerce, Marketing, or related field (preferred)
· Strong English communication skills required
· Organized, self-motivated, and detail-oriented
· Good understanding of online marketing and digital best practices
· Positive, energetic attitude with an innovative mindset
· Competitive renumeration
· A role within a leading luxury hospitality group
· Exposure to multi-property e-commerce operations
· A dynamic and collaborative working environment
· Clear development opportunities towards Senior E-Commerce and managerial roles within Mar-Bella Collection
ai_benefits: A dynamic and collaborative working environment
Clear development opportunities towards Senior E-Commerce and managerial roles within Mar-Bella Collection
ai_core_responsibilities: The Executive will contribute to increasing turnover via direct online reservations by managing rates, inventory, and listings across all online channels. They will also collaborate with a digital agency to enhance website KPIs and support online campaigns and projects.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have previous experience in hotel e-commerce and hands-on experience with OTAs and Channel Management systems. A Bachelor's degree in E-Commerce, Marketing, or a related field is preferred, alongside strong English communication skills.
linkedin_org_slogan: A family of hotels connecting you to the beautiful Ionian Sea
linkedin_org_locations: Agios Ioannis Peristeron, Corfu, Corfu 490 84, GR
linkedin_org_description: Mar-Βella Collection is a constantly evolving Hotel Group aiming into offering award-winning holiday experiences featured by service of excellence, personalized care, and dedication to customers. Holding a unique portfolio of 3 luxury 5* star properties, the iconic 5* family, MarBella, its adjacent sister, adult-only suite hotel Nido, a proud member of Small Luxury Hotels of the World, both located in the island of Corfu and the new Elix located in Perdika Thesprotia. Mar-Bella Collection offers unique experiences that satisfy its guests desires at every stage of their life and a family of hotels connecting people to the beautiful Ionian Sea!

title: Freelance Physics Expert with Python Expertise - AI Trainer
description_text:
Please submit your CV in English and indicate your level of English proficiency. 
Mindrift connects specialists with project-based AI opportunities for leading tech companies, focused on testing, evaluating, and improving AI systems. Participation is project-based, not permanent employment.
What this opportunity involves 
While each project involves unique tasks, contributors may: 
Design rigorous physics problems reflecting professional practice; 
Evaluate AI solutions for correctness, assumptions, and constraints; 
Validate calculations or simulations using Python (NumPy, Pandas, SciPy); 
Improve AI reasoning to align with industry-standard logic; 
Apply structured scoring criteria to multi-step problems.
What we look for 
This opportunity is a good fit for physicists with an experience in python open to part-time, non-permanent projects. Ideally, contributors will have: 
Degree in Physics or related fields, e.g. Engineering Physics, Thermodynamics, Statistical Mechanics, Optics and Acoustics, etc. 
3+ years of professional physics experience 
Strong written English (C1/C2) 
Strong Python proficiency for numerical validation 
Stable internet connection 
Professional certifications (e.g., CPhys, EurPhys, MInstP) and experience in international or applied projects are an advantage.
How it works 
Apply → Pass qualification(s) → Join a project → Complete tasks → Get paid
Project time expectations 
For this project, tasks are estimated to require around 10–20 hours per week during active phases, based on project requirements. This is an estimate, not a guaranteed workload, and applies only while the project is active. 
Payment 
Paid contributions, with rates up to $10/hour* 
Fixed project rate or individual rates, depending on the project 
Some projects include incentive payments 
*Note: Rates vary based on expertise, skills assessment, location, project needs, and other factors. Higher rates may be offered to highly specialized experts. Lower rates may apply during onboarding or non-core project phases. Payment details are shared per project.
ai_core_responsibilities: Contributors will be responsible for designing rigorous physics problems reflecting professional practice and evaluating AI solutions for correctness, assumptions, and constraints. ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess a degree in Physics or related fields and have at least 3 years of professional physics experience, coupled with strong proficiency in Python for numerical validation. title: Business Development Representative
description_text:
WHO WE ARE: 
SHEDPRO (a subsidiary of SEADEV LLC) is a software product company that delivers effective and affordable digital solutions to the Shed industry. We measure our success not only in terms of profit, but also in terms of global impact. As a company, we seek to care for our team members and bring transformation to lives in our community. Over the next 10 years we are laser focused on achieving our targets of growing our business 10-fold, supporting over 500 jobs in 10 developing markets, while positively transforming the communities we work within by giving financially and volunteering our time.
JOB OVERVIEW
We’re looking for a Business Development Representative (BDR) to help build our sales pipeline by having real conversations and turning them into qualified sales meetings.
This role is focused on early-stage sales and outbound prospecting. You’ll qualify inbound and marketing leads, re-engage warm prospects, and run targeted outbound outreach using an account-based approach. A meaningful portion of your work will involve cold calling and follow-up with small business owners, many of them blue-collar operators.
If you enjoy talking to people, asking good questions, and opening doors for the sales team, this role will be a strong fit.
WHAT WILL YOU DO?
As a Business Development Representative, your responsibilities will include:
Qualify Leads and Create Sales Opportunities
Qualify inbound and marketing-generated leads using clear criteria
Re-engage warm leads from prior conversations, demos, or campaigns
Uncover prospect pain points, decision-makers, urgency, and fit
Turn real conversations into well-defined Sales Qualified Leads (SQLs)
Book Meetings and Set Up the Sales Team to Win
Book discovery and demo meetings for the Account Executive
Ensure meetings are properly prepared with notes, context, and clear next steps
Confirm meetings and follow up to reduce no-shows (automation encouraged)
Hand off clean, well-documented opportunities
Outbound Prospecting (A Core Part of the Job)
Cold call and prospect small business owners and operators
Build and maintain targeted prospect lists within our ideal customer profiles
Run outbound outreach across phone, email, SMS, and other channels
Personalize outreach based on industry, role, and known challenges
CRM and Pipeline Discipline
Keep CRM data accurate, complete, and up to date
Log calls, emails, notes, and qualification details consistently
Follow existing workflows and help improve sequences and processes
Ensure lead data is usable for reporting and marketing follow-up
Team Collaboration and Feedback
Work closely with the Account Executive on qualification standards
Share feedback with Marketing on lead quality, messaging, and objections
Surface patterns from the field to improve targeting and positioning
WHAT DO YOU NEED?
Required
Strong communication skills and comfort speaking with small business owners.
Organized, self-motivated, and comfortable working in a fully remote environment.
Willingness to learn and adapt in a fast-moving, small-team setting.
Preferred
Prior experience as a BDR, SDR, or in an inside sales role.
Experience in the portable buildings industry
Prior experience selling to or working with blue-collar, trades, owner-operator businesses, or rural businesses.
Experience in Software as a Service.
Familiarity with CRM systems and sales engagement tools.
Experience setting up or improving sales workflows, tools, or sequences.
Previous experience in a startup or small-team environment.
Work Information:
On-Target Earnings (OTE): $45,000 - $65,000 per year.
Base Salary: $30,000 - $45,000 per year.
Bonuses & Incentives: Monthly performance-based incentives.
Type of work: Remote Contractor (collaborate with Sales Team & International Production Team).
Career Growth: Opportunities within Sales or Customer Success Teams.
Bonus & Gifts: Work anniversary bonus, Referral bonus, Commission for bringing new project, Birthday gifts for employees and their children.
Performance & Salary Review: Annual assessments to ensure fair and equal pay based on performance results.
17 days off per year: 10 days of annual leave, 5 sick days, 2 Christmas days, and other public holidays as per regulations.
ai_benefits: Birthday gifts for employees and their children
ai_core_responsibilities: The Business Development Representative will focus on building the sales pipeline by qualifying inbound and marketing leads, re-engaging warm prospects, and running targeted outbound outreach, primarily involving cold calling small business owners. Key tasks include turning real conversations into Sales Qualified Leads (SQLs) and booking discovery/demo meetings for the Account Executive.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess strong communication skills and comfort speaking with small business owners, along with being organized, self-motivated, and adaptable to a fast-moving, fully remote team setting. Preferred qualifications include prior experience as a BDR/SDR, experience in the portable buildings industry, or experience selling to blue-collar/owner-operator businesses, especially within a Software as a Service context.
linkedin_org_slogan: Creating Inspiration
linkedin_org_locations: 2403 Massanetta Springs Rd, Rockingham County, Virginia 22801, US
33 An Thuong 33, Da Nang, Da Nang 55000, VN
109 TRAN HUNG DAO STREET, CAPITAL TOWER, 21ST FLOOR, Hanoi, VN
linkedin_org_description: Founded in 2011, Seadev is an international digital agency with a development office in Da Nang, Vietnam, and representatives in the US. With dedication, we deliver simple, beautiful, and affordable web-based sales and marketing solutions. Our purpose is to create jobs, improve lives, and make awesome stuff.

Over the next 10 years we are laser focused on achieving our targets of growing our business 10-fold, supporting over 500 jobs in 10 developing markets, while positively transforming the communities we work within by giving financially and volunteering our time.
JOB OVERVIEW
We’re looking for a Business Development Representative (BDR) to help build our sales pipeline by having real conversations and turning them into qualified sales meetings.
This role is focused on early-stage sales and outbound prospecting. You’ll qualify inbound and marketing leads, re-engage warm prospects, and run targeted outbound outreach using an account-based approach. A meaningful portion of your work will involve cold calling and follow-up with small business owners, many of them blue-collar operators.
If you enjoy talking to people, asking good questions, and opening doors for the sales team, this role will be a strong fit.
WHAT WILL YOU DO?
As a Business Development Representative, your responsibilities will include:
Qualify Leads and Create Sales Opportunities
Qualify inbound and marketing-generated leads using clear criteria
Re-engage warm leads from prior conversations, demos, or campaigns
Uncover prospect pain points, decision-makers, urgency, and fit
Turn real conversations into well-defined Sales Qualified Leads (SQLs)
Book Meetings and Set Up the Sales Team to Win
Book discovery and demo meetings for the Account Executive
Ensure meetings are properly prepared with notes, context, and clear next steps
Confirm meetings and follow up to reduce no-shows (automation encouraged)
Hand off clean, well-documented opportunities
Outbound Prospecting (A Core Part of the Job)
Cold call and prospect small business owners and operators
Build and maintain targeted prospect lists within our ideal customer profiles
Run outbound outreach across phone, email, SMS, and other channels
Personalize outreach based on industry, role, and known challenges
CRM and Pipeline Discipline
Keep CRM data accurate, complete, and up to date
Log calls, emails, notes, and qualification details consistently
Follow existing workflows and help improve sequences and processes
Ensure lead data is usable for reporting and marketing follow-up
Team Collaboration and Feedback
Work closely with the Account Executive on qualification standards
Share feedback with Marketing on lead quality, messaging, and objections
Surface patterns from the field to improve targeting and positioning
WHAT DO YOU NEED?
Required
Strong communication skills and comfort speaking with small business owners.
Organized, self-motivated, and comfortable working in a fully remote environment.
Willingness to learn and adapt in a fast-moving, small-team setting.
Preferred
Prior experience as a BDR, SDR, or in an inside sales role.
Experience in the portable buildings industry
Prior experience selling to or working with blue-collar, trades, owner-operator businesses, or rural businesses.
Experience in Software as a Service.
Familiarity with CRM systems and sales engagement tools.
Experience setting up or improving sales workflows, tools, or sequences.
Previous experience in a startup or small-team environment.
Work Information:
On-Target Earnings (OTE): $45,000 - $65,000 per year.
Base Salary: $30,000 - $45,000 per year.
Bonuses & Incentives: Monthly performance-based incentives.
Type of work: Remote Contractor (collaborate with Sales Team & International Production Team).
Career Growth: Opportunities within Sales or Customer Success Teams.
Bonus & Gifts: Work anniversary bonus, Referral bonus, Commission for bringing new project, Birthday gifts for employees and their children.
Performance & Salary Review: Annual assessments to ensure fair and equal pay based on performance results.
17 days off per year: 10 days of annual leave, 5 sick days, 2 Christmas days, and other public holidays as per regulations.
ai_benefits: Birthday gifts for employees and their children
ai_core_responsibilities: The Business Development Representative will focus on building the sales pipeline by qualifying inbound and marketing leads, re-engaging warm prospects, and running targeted outbound prospecting, primarily through cold calling small business owners. Key tasks include turning conversations into Sales Qualified Leads (SQLs) and booking discovery/demo meetings for the Account Executive.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess strong communication skills and be comfortable speaking with small business owners, while also being organized and self-motivated for a fully remote setting. Preferred qualifications include prior experience as a BDR/SDR, experience in the portable buildings industry, or experience selling to blue-collar/owner-operator businesses, especially within a SaaS context.

title: Specialist, Operations
description_text:
Calling all truly AWESOME people! 
About Stranger Soccer 
Stranger Soccer (www.strangersoccer.com) is a Singapore-based company experiencing explosive growth. In a few short years, after launching a revolutionary platform and Mobile App for on-demand football, the company has amassed over 50,000 registered users playing hundreds of games a week. It has solved the problem that football is the world's #1 sport, but is difficult for an individual to play. Stranger Soccer makes it as easy as going to the gym or for a jog. Browse. Book a slot. Show up and play. Today, it is the #1 way people play football and futsal in Singapore, and is rapidly expanding internationally via a license partner model, with locations in Australia, India, USA, UAE, and South Africa. 
Role 
The selected candidate(s) will work closely with the City Manager and a small team to manage day to day operations of the flagship Singapore business, focused on inventory and revenue management, customer experience and service, and other ad hoc initiatives. We are looking for a dynamic and hospitality-oriented team player! 
Relevant experience, e.g. hospitality, sales, customer support, logistics, operations, inventory management 
Excellent English communication skills 
Strong attention to detail 
Passion for customer service 
Friendly positive attitude and team player 
Bachelor's Degree/Diploma 
Interest in football is a BIG PLUS 
Experience working overseas or with international companies a PLUS 
Hospitality experience a PLUS 
Franchise Development or Support experience a PLUS 
Other Details 
Position will be virtual (e.g., based in Philippines) with occasional travel to Singapore. 
Pay: Php 28,000 -33,000 per month
To apply, please send resume to recruitment@strangersoccer.com. Please include cover note and salary expectations.
ai_core_responsibilities: The selected candidate will manage the day-to-day operations of the flagship Singapore business, focusing on inventory and revenue management, customer experience, and service delivery. They will also assist with other ad hoc initiatives as required by the City Manager and the team.
ai_requirements_summary: The role seeks a dynamic and hospitality-oriented team player with relevant experience in areas like hospitality, sales, customer support, logistics, or operations. Candidates must possess excellent English communication skills, strong attention to detail, and a friendly, positive attitude.
linkedin_org_slogan: Playing Football ⚽️: As easy as going for a jog. Singapore’s #1. Now accepting applications for international licensees.
linkedin_org_locations: 7 Temasek Boulevard, Suntec Tower One, Singapore, 038987, SG
linkedin_org_description:
3.5 billion people in 200 countries love football. Why don't more of them play? 

Stranger Soccer’s acclaimed app-enabled platform makes playing football (soccer, futbol) as easy as going for a jog. 

Singapore born, now open in 10+ cities with 100,000+ games run. Accepting applications for license partners to own and operate Stranger Soccer in key cities around the world.

Interested in bringing Stranger Soccer to your city or country? We are now accepting applications for license partners to own and operate Stranger Soccer in their city. Learn more here: www.strangersoccer.com

title: Freelance Physics Expert with Python Expertise - AI Trainer
description_text:
Please submit your CV in English and indicate your level of English proficiency. 
Mindrift connects specialists with project-based AI opportunities for leading tech companies, focused on testing, evaluating, and improving AI systems. Participation is project-based, not permanent employment.
What this opportunity involves 
While each project involves unique tasks, contributors may: 
Design rigorous physics problems reflecting professional practice; 
Evaluate AI solutions for correctness, assumptions, and constraints; 
Validate calculations or simulations using Python (NumPy, Pandas, SciPy); 
Improve AI reasoning to align with industry-standard logic; 
Apply structured scoring criteria to multi-step problems.
What we look for 
This opportunity is a good fit for physicists with an experience in python open to part-time, non-permanent projects. Ideally, contributors will have: 
Degree in Physics or related fields, e.g. Engineering Physics, Thermodynamics, Statistical Mechanics, Optics and Acoustics, etc. 
3+ years of professional physics experience 
Strong written English (C1/C2) 
Strong Python proficiency for numerical validation 
Stable internet connection 
Professional certifications (e.g., CPhys, EurPhys, MInstP) and experience in international or applied projects are an advantage.
How it works 
Apply → Pass qualification(s) → Join a project → Complete tasks → Get paid
Project time expectations 
For this project, tasks are estimated to require around 10–20 hours per week during active phases, based on project requirements. This is an estimate, not a guaranteed workload, and applies only while the project is active. 
Payment 
Paid contributions, with rates up to $10/hour* 
Fixed project rate or individual rates, depending on the project 
Some projects include incentive payments 
*Note: Rates vary based on expertise, skills assessment, location, project needs, and other factors. Higher rates may be offered to highly specialized experts. Lower rates may apply during onboarding or non-core project phases. Payment details are shared per project.
ai_core_responsibilities: Contributors will design rigorous physics problems and evaluate AI solutions for correctness and assumptions. They will also validate calculations using Python and improve AI reasoning.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a degree in Physics or related fields and at least 3 years of professional physics experience. Strong proficiency in Python and written English is also required.
linkedin_org_slogan: Be the “I” in AI with Mindrift. Work from anywhere on groundbreaking AI projects
linkedin_org_description:
Welcome to Mindrift — a space where innovation meets opportunity. We’re a pioneering platform dedicated to advancing the field of artificial intelligence through collaborative online projects. Our focus lies in creating data for generative AI, offering a unique chance for freelancers to contribute to AI development from anywhere, at any time.

At Mindrift, we believe in the power of collective intelligence to shape the future of AI. Our platform allows users to dive into a variety of tasks — ranging from creating training prompts for AI models to refining AI responses for greater relevance.

Let’s build the future of AI together, one task at a time.

title: Boutique Store Assistant (S26)
regions_derived: Peloponnese, Western Greece and the Ionian
locations_derived: Corfu, Peloponnese, Western Greece and the Ionian, Greece
description_text:
"Ella” means ‘come’ in Greek. A heartfelt invitation to explore, connect, and feel inspired. At Ella Resorts, we open our doors to a world where every moment becomes a cherished memory. We reimagine the art of resort living for the modern lifestyle traveler. Those who seek not just a destination, but a meaningful journey. Our curated collection of beachfront retreats, set across some of the Mediterranean’s most iconic shores, invites you to embrace adventure, unwind in style, and discover the true essence of summer living.
In order to support our rapid growth we are seeking to hire a Boutique Store Assistant for our fully renovated Resort in Corfu, Alkyna Lifestyle Beach Resort.
Position Summary
To provide guests with a memorable shopping experience by offering exceptional service and showcasing store products, while ensuring the boutique store operates smoothly and efficiently.
Main Responsibilities & Accountabilities 
Welcome and assist guests in a friendly, professional manner
Provide information on products
Handle sales transactions and operate the cash register/POS system
Maintain the cleanliness and visual merchandising of the store
Monitor stock levels and assist in inventory management
Support the implementation of promotional activities
Ensure guest satisfaction and handle any inquiries or minor complaints
Previous experience in retail or customer service, preferably in a boutique setting
Good knowledge of English; knowledge of additional languages is a plus
Familiarity with POS systems is an advantage
High school diploma or equivalent
Warm, engaging, and service-oriented personality
Strong communication and interpersonal skills
Sales-driven mindset with attention to detail
Flexibility and ability to work in a dynamic environment
Competitive remuneration package
Career advancement in a fast-growing organization
Continuous learning & development within a transparent & inclusive working environment
Collaborative working environment
Accommodation & meals
Ella Resorts are dedicated to providing exceptional guest experiences across its brand and our amazing Team members are at the heart of it.
Join us today to build our future together.

title: Accountant - #34877
description_text:
As an Accountant this opportunity is perfect for you because it allows you to work with a global team of NetSuite experts, gain exposure to multiple industries, and apply your finance and accounting skills in a system-driven environment where you can manage processes efficiently and contribute to improving client operations.
Company Profile:
Our client provides tailored NetSuite solutions for businesses all around the world. With locations in Asia, Europe, and the United States, our certified NetSuite Consultants have the capability to support all your NetSuite needs, wherever you are, whenever you need.
With more than 160 employees, we leverage our expertise in every facet of NetSuite to support our clientele of more than 130 organizations.
Duties and Responsibilities: 
Prepare and post journal entries to the general ledger accurately and in a timely manner.
Record and reconcile daily sales transactions across multiple channels.
Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements in accordance with accounting standards and for submission to banking partners.
Reconcile bank statements, credit card accounts, and other balance sheet accounts.
Maintain accurate and organized accounting records and supporting documentation.
Monitor accounts receivable and payable transactions and ensure proper allocations.
Prepare and submit cash flow reports, funding requests, and other financial schedules as needed.
Assist with month-end and year-end closing processes.
Ensure compliance with company policies, accounting principles, and relevant regulations.
Support management with ad-hoc financial analysis and reporting.
This role is expected to work for a US based retail client.
Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in accounting, finance, or any related field
3–5 years of professional accounting experience, preferably in a corporate environment
CPA is not mandatory
Preferably worked with a US Retail client.
Preferably someone with experience in General Ledger (GL).
Airtable and QuickBooks experience are a plus
Skills:
Strong understanding of GAAP and financial reporting requirements.
Proficiency in accounting software (ERP experience a plus) and advanced Excel skills.
Excellent communication skills and ability to work collaboratively across departments.
Airtable, QuickBooks are a plus
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Excellent attention to detail and organizational abilities.
Proven ability to manage multiple clients and deadlines efficiently.
Other:
High level of discretion and integrity in handling confidential client data.
Ability to work independently or collaboratively in a fast-paced environment. 
Job Type: Hybrid Set-up
Employment Type: Full-time
Schedule: Monday – Friday 8:00 AM TO 5:00 PM EST | 9:00 PM TO 6:00 AM PHT (including 1 hour break)
Location: Makati City
Industry: IT Services and IT Consulting
ai_core_responsibilities: The Accountant will prepare and post journal entries, record and reconcile daily sales transactions, and prepare financial statements. Additionally, they will assist with month-end and year-end closing processes and ensure compliance with accounting principles.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a Bachelor's degree in accounting or finance and 3-5 years of professional accounting experience. Experience with a US retail client and knowledge of accounting software like QuickBooks is preferred.
linkedin_org_slogan: Talent Guaranteed
linkedin_org_locations: No.2 Orion cor. Mercedes St., Brgy. Bel-Air, Astbury Building, Makati City, Metro Manila 1209, PH
linkedin_org_description:
Manila Recruitment is a full service recruitment consultancy providing executive, expert and technical recruitment support for the Filipino market. We are the leader in innovation for recruitment solutions in the Philippines since 2010.  We were born from entrepreneurial roots, and carefully crafted into a full-service consultancy that delivers a suite of innovative headhunting and talent sourcing solutions. Our expertise is defined by an unparalleled understanding of the “big picture” business needs of our clients, and how recruitment solutions can only be tailored for optimum results when a holistic view is taken. 

The Manila Recruitment difference is rooted in our passion to scour the globe for cutting-edge developments in recruitment science. We get genuinely excited by developments in social sourcing strategies, web 3.0 tools for headhunters and areas of innovation that can help us deliver the best client and candidate experiences. We identify and deliver the latest international recruitment strategies specifically adapted for headhunting talent within the Filipino market. Producing unrivalled access to perfectly matched, previously undiscoverable talent for our clients. The recipe is simple, innovation, international best practice, combined with local market knowledge, a candidate database of over 40,000 and growing, and of course our greatest asset – simply the best team of passive talent sourcing, end-to-end recruitment consultants in the Philippines!

title: Safety Engineer | Τεχνικός Ασφαλείας
description_text:
Hellas Gold Single Member S.A. is a mining company for gold, silver, lead, and zinc, headquartered in Athens. Since 2004, it has been responsibly and safely developing and operating the Kassandra Mines in NE Halkidiki under the strictest environmental terms. The Kassandra Mines consist of three mining projects: the Stratoni-Mavres Petres Mine, the Olympias Mine, and the Skouries Project. Continuing a 25-century mining history, Hellas Gold invests in the sustainable development of the Kassandra Mines, boosting economic growth and contributing to the prosperity of the local community with investments exceeding $3 billion, employing over 2,000 workers, actively supporting local suppliers, and making significant investments in local community support initiatives and projects. Since 2012, it operates as a subsidiary of Eldorado Gold Corporation, a Canadian mining company with over 30 years experience in the exploration, development, and operation of mines worldwide.
We live our values in pursuit of our purpose: to find a better way to do things. We aim to break new ground in all that we do. We do this by creating a positive impact today, and for future generations, through our commitment to operating safely, sustainably, and profitably.
The company offers the opportunity to those who wish to express interest in the position of “Safety Engineer | Τεχνικός Ασφαλείας”, for its premises in Chalkidiki. The position will be reported to the Safety Engineer Supervisor of the Health & Safety department in Skouries.
Main Responsibilities: 
Understand and comply with the rules and regulations of the governing laws, the Hellas Gold (Eldorado Gold) health safety policy, management system, standards and practices.
Facilitate the development of the Hellas Gold strategic OHS plan. Assist site in developing their annual OHS plans.
Act as technical expert and advisor for risk management processes and provide appropriate recommendations to site’s line management.
Train and develop site’s superiors, peers and subordinates in the performance of their OHS duties. Act as quality control for this performance and provide feedback / coaching as required.
Analyze Health and Safety trends to determine opportunities for improvement. Communicate findings and recommendations to site’s management in a form that is actionable and measurable.
Effective implementation and maintenance of established health and safety policy, systems, standards and safe work procedures. Identify and rectify any gaps in system development and workforce understanding.
Responsible for occupational health monitoring and workplace measurements (noise, vibration, dust, illumination, ventilation, gases).
Ensure all site’s incidents are reported and investigated in accordance with procedural and legislative requirements, and Company reporting standards.
Develop an annual Health and Safety site’s inspections/audits plan.
Develop site’s annual health and safety targets and objectives.
Maintain a consolidated site’s risk register.
Supervise and implement the international safety standards (ISO 39001, ISO 45001).
Ensure the proper P.P.E usage and continuous evaluation of their suitability. 
Participate in OHS systems development (Risk Assessment, Job Safety Analysis, Safe Work Instructions, Standard Operation Procedures, Emergency Response Plans, Policies).
Requirements:
Degree in Mining & Metallurgical Engineering or in Mineral Resources Engineering.
Member of the Technical Chamber of Greece.
0–2 years of experience in underground mining is desirable.
Strong knowledge of MS Office software & database skills.
Knowledge of risk management, incident investigation and reporting, auditing and inspecting.
Good knowledge of Greek Mining Law.
Very good skills in analyzing information and statistics.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills in Greek and English.
Driving License.
Our company offers a competitive remuneration package that includes an attractive combination of basic salary and benefits, as well as opportunities for development in a challenging work environment.
Inclusion and Diversity
Hellas Gold is an equal opportunities employer. We are committed to promoting an inclusive and diverse workplace where we value and respect every colleague for who they are and provide equality of opportunity so that everyone can fulfill their potential.
If you are looking for a global and dynamic environment, please send us your CV.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Safety Engineer will ensure compliance with all governing laws and company health and safety policies, facilitate the development of strategic and annual OHS plans, and act as a technical advisor for risk management processes.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess a degree in Mining & Metallurgical Engineering or Mineral Resources Engineering and be a member of the Technical Chamber of Greece, with desirable experience in underground mining.
linkedin_org_slogan: Η Ελληνικός Χρυσός είναι μεταλλευτική εταιρεία που διαχειρίζεται τα Μεταλλεία Κασσάνδρας στη ΒΑ Χαλκιδική.
linkedin_org_locations: Leoforos Vasilissis Sofias 23A, Athens, Attica  10674, GR
linkedin_org_description:
Η Ελληνικός Χρυσός είναι μια μεταλλευτική εταιρεία χρυσού, αργύρου, μολύβδου και ψευδαργύρου, με έδρα την Αθήνα. Από το 2004 μέχρι και σήμερα, αναπτύσσει και λειτουργεί με υπευθυνότητα και ασφάλεια τα Μεταλλεία Κασσάνδρας στη Βορειανατολική Χαλκιδική (Μεταλλείο Στρατωνίου-Μαύρων Πετρών, Μεταλλείο Ολυμπιάδας, Έργο Σκουριών). Από το 2012, η εταιρεία λειτουργεί ως θυγατρική της Eldorado Gold Corporation, μία καναδική μεταλλευτική εταιρεία με μακρόχρονη εμπειρία στην έρευνα, ανάπτυξη και λειτουργία μεταλλείων ανά τον κόσμο.

Συνεχίζοντας μία μεταλλευτική ιστορία 25 αιώνων, η Ελληνικός Χρυσός επενδύει στη βιώσιμη ανάπτυξη των Μεταλλείων Κασσάνδρας δίνοντας ώθηση στην οικονομική ανάπτυξη και συμβάλλοντας στην ευημερία της τοπικής κοινωνίας με επενδύσεις που ξεπερνούν το $3 δισ., απασχόληση άνω των 2.000 εργαζόμενων, ενεργή στήριξη των τοπικών προμηθευτών και σημαντικές επενδύσεις σε πρωτοβουλίες και έργα υποστήριξης της τοπικής κοινωνίας. Όλα αυτά υπογραμμίζονται από την εταιρική δέσμευση για υπεύθυνη αξιοποίηση του ορυκτού πλούτου της περιοχής εφαρμόζοντας τα υψηλότερα διεθνή πρότυπα περιβαλλοντικής διαχείρισης και ασφάλειας και δημιουργώντας μακροπρόθεσμο όφελος για όλα τα ενδιαφερόμενα μέρη.

title: Referee (cum Official Game Host)
description_text:
Calling all truly AWESOME people!
About Stranger Soccer
Stranger Soccer (www.strangersoccer.com) is a Singapore-based company experiencing explosive growth. In a few short years, after launching a revolutionary platform and Mobile App for on-demand football, the company has amassed over 50,000 registered users playing hundreds of games a week. It has solved the problem that football is the world's #1 sport, but is difficult for an individual to play. Stranger Soccer makes it as easy as going to the gym or for a jog. Browse. Book a slot. Show up and play. Today, it is the #1 way people play football and futsal in Singapore, and is rapidly expanding internationally via a license partner model, with locations in Australia, India, USA, UAE, and South Africa.
Job Description
Stranger Soccer is seeking OUTSTANDING REFEREES who can officiate the game, but ALSO serve as Official Hosts - our brand
ambassadors.
This means in addition to traditional referee duties, the person must have great people skills, welcoming players and making
sure they have a positive game experience from the moment they arrive till their departure.
Working Hours
Games will be assigned each week during the following timeframes, at locations all over Singapore
Monday to Friday: 6 pm - 11 pm
Saturday & Sunday: 9 am – 11 pm
Roles
Be an ambassador of the Stranger Soccer brand at the games, welcoming players and ensuring they have a great
experience from start to finish
Officiating the games as an outstanding, experienced referee

Class 3 Licensed Referee or strong experience
FUN outgoing personality
Understanding of and passion for football
Excellent people and communication skills
Previous experience in customer service is a plus
To apply, please send resume to recruitment@strangersoccer.com, attaching your Class 3 License, if applicable

title: Customer Experience & Growth Intern
description_text:
Calling all truly AWESOME people! 
About Stranger Soccer 
Stranger Soccer (www.strangersoccer.com) is a Singapore-based company experiencing explosive growth. In a few short years, after launching a revolutionary platform and Mobile App for on-demand football, the company has amassed over 50,000 registered users playing hundreds of games a week. It has solved the problem that football is the world's #1 sport, but is difficult for an individual to play. Stranger Soccer makes it as easy as going to the gym or for a jog. Browse. Book a slot. Show up and play. Today, it is the #1 way people play football and futsal in Singapore, and is rapidly expanding internationally via a license partner model, with locations in Australia, India, USA, UAE, and South Africa. 
Role and Responsibilities 
The selected candidate(s) will be a key member of a small team working at the company’s flagship operation in Singapore, carrying out various business development and customer relationship related initiatives across the organization. The position will be working closely with the CEO and the Executive Director and will interface with key staff across the organization, as well as customers and other stakeholders. The company is committed to growing and developing talent which will access increasing levels of responsibility as the company grows into an international brand. 
Serving on the front lines of the customer experience, serving as an “Official Host” of a few football games each week 
Coordinating and executing various tasks related to the daily operation of the business, such as marketing, logistics, customer service, sales, hosting 
The candidate will: 
Gain experience in daily operations of a business 
Gain experience and confidence in presenting and communicating with customers 
Gain experience in what a Singapore brand must consider in efforts to expand internationally 
Gain experience in working with and communicating with multiple stakeholders in an organization 
Strong written and verbal communication skills 
A can-do attitude 
Interest in football is a BIG PLUS 
Hospitality experience a PLUS 
Compensation and Other Details 
Commitment of 3 months up to 12 months 
Compensation of up to $900/month, comprised of a monthly allowance and a completion bonus 
Welcome Kit including $150 in jerseys and merchandise 
50% staff discount on games + $100 bonus game credits upon completion 
Completion Certificate 
To apply, please send resume to recruitment@strangersoccer.com
ai_core_responsibilities: The intern will be a key team member executing various business development and customer relationship initiatives, working closely with senior leadership across the organization. Responsibilities include serving as an 'Official Host' for games and coordinating daily operational tasks like marketing, logistics, customer service, and sales.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess strong written and verbal communication skills and maintain a can-do attitude while gaining experience in business operations and international expansion considerations. Interest in football and prior hospitality experience are considered significant advantages.
linkedin_org_slogan: Playing Football ⚽️: As easy as going for a jog. Singapore’s #1. Now accepting applications for international licensees.
linkedin_org_locations: 7 Temasek Boulevard, Suntec Tower One, Singapore, 038987, SG

title: Sales Assistant - Nafpaktos
regions_derived: Peloponnese, Western Greece and the Ionian
locations_derived: Municipal Unit of Nafpaktos, Peloponnese, Western Greece and the Ionian, Greece
description_text:
Στην SINSAY, μέλος της LPP S.A., αναζητάμε ΠΩΛΗΤΡΙΕΣ – ΠΩΛΗΤΕΣ για το νέο μας κατάστημα που πρόκειται να ανοίξει σύντομα στη Ναύπακτο, επί της οδού Γεωρ. Αθανασιάδη Νόβα 54!
ΣΧΕΤΙΚΑ ΜΕ ΕΜΑΣ
Η LPP S.A. είναι μία από τις μεγαλύτερες εταιρείες μόδας στην Κεντρική και Ανατολική Ευρώπη. Η εταιρεία δραστηριοποιείται σταθερά στην Πολωνία και στο εξωτερικό για περισσότερα από 26 χρόνια, και με επιτυχία ανταποκρίνεται στις απαιτήσεις της αγοράς στον τομέα των ενδυμάτων. 
Η LPP S.A. διαχειρίζεται 5 Brands μόδας: Reserved, Cropp, House, Mohito και Sinsay, που το κάθε ένα απευθύνεται σε διαφορετικό κοινό.
Η εταιρεία απαριθμεί πάνω από 2.200 καταστήματα στο δίκτυό της και επιπλέον διαθέτει και καταστήματα on-line για το κάθε της Brand. 
Έχει παρουσία σε 40 χώρες και απασχολεί πάνω από 30.000 υπαλλήλους στα γραφεία και στα καταστήματά της. 
· Καθημερινή αναπλήρωση των προϊόντων στο κατάστημα.
· Συμμετοχή στην διεξαγωγή των παραλαβών και στην οργάνωση της αποθήκης.
· Φροντίδα για την διατήρηση της σωστής εικόνας του καταστήματος, σύμφωνα με τις οδηγίες του visual merchanting της εταιρείας. 
· Τάξη και καθαριότητα στον χώρο του καταστήματος και της αποθήκης.
· Πολύ καλή γνώση των προϊόντων που πουλάμε στο κατάστημα και του αποθέματος στην αποθήκη.
· Οργάνωση των πακέτων του e shop.
· Πολύ καλή επικοινωνία με τους πελάτες με στόχο την δημιουργία σχέσης εμπιστοσύνης και την αύξηση των πωλήσεων.
· Συμμετοχή στην επίτευξη των στόχων του καταστήματος.
· Εργασία στο ταμείο.
· Εφαρμογή των εταιρικών λειτουργιών και διαδικασιών.
· Ανταγωνιστικό πακέτο αποδοχών.
· Παροχή διατακτικών (meal vouchers) σε όλους τους υπαλλήλους του καταστήματος.
· Ομαδικό πρόγραμμα ιδιωτικής ασφάλισης υγείας.
· Γραμμή Υποστήριξης των Εργαζομένων (HELPP).
· Εκπτώσεις για αγορές στα καταστήματα της LPP στην Ελλάδα.
· Συνεχής κατάρτιση και εκπαίδευση.
· Προοπτικές για ανάπτυξη και εξέλιξη μέσα στην εταιρεία.
· Ευχάριστο εργασιακό περιβάλλον.
Η LPP GREECE που εδρεύει στην Αθήνα, στην οδό Άγγελου Πυρρή 5 & Ευήνου, ως Υπεύθυνος Επεξεργασίας επεξεργάζεται τα προσωπικά σας δεδομένα αποκλειστικά στο μέτρο που απαιτείται κατά την διαδικασία συνέντευξης και ενδεχόμενης πρόσληψης και έχει λάβει όλα τα κατάλληλα τεχνικά και οργανωτικά μέτρα για την προστασία των προσωπικών δεδομένων σας σύμφωνα με την ισχύουσα ελληνική νομοθεσία και τις διατάξεις του Γενικού Κανονισμού Προστασίας Προσωπικών Δεδομένων (ΕΕ) 2016/679. Τα δεδομένα που γνωστοποιείτε στην LPP GREECE μέσω της αίτησης σας θα διατηρούνται για τυχόν μελλοντική χρήση για χρονικό διάστημα ενός έτους από τη λήψη τους προς αξιοποίηση μελλοντικής πρόσληψης. Για την εκπλήρωση των ανωτέρω αναφερομένων σκοπών επεξεργασίας των προσωπικών σας δεδομένων η LPP GREECE δύναται να γνωστοποιεί ή να διαβιβάζει προσωπικά δεδομένα που μας έχετε δώσει σε θυγατρικές ή συνδεδεμένες με την LPP GREECE εταιρείες. Μπορείτε ανά πάσα στιγμή με αίτημα σας στην LPP GREECE να ασκήσετε τα δικαιώματα που προβλέπει ο Κανονισμός, συμπεριλαμβανομένου του δικαιώματος ενημέρωσης και πρόσβασης, διόρθωσης, διαγραφής, περιορισμού της επεξεργασίας, φορητότητας και του δικαιώματος αντίρρησης ως προς την επεξεργασία μέσω email στη διεύθυνση privacygreece@lpp.com , αλλά και να απευθυνθείτε στην Αρχή Προστασίας Προσωπικών Δεδομένων (www.dpa.gr).

LPP S.A. is one of the largest fashion companies in Central and Eastern Europe. The company has been operating steadily in Poland and abroad for more than 26 years, successfully meeting market demands in the field of clothing.
LPP S.A. manages 5 fashion brands: Reserved, Cropp, House, Mohito, and Sinsay, each of which addresses a different audience.
The company lists over 2.200 stores in its network and additionally has online stores for each of its Brands. It has presence in 40 countries. 
We are ambitious, which means that we are constantly looking for new challenges and striving to improve. 
Our biggest strength is our team, which today consists of more than 30.000 talented people in our offices and stores. Their passion motivates us to still have the energy and courage to reach for more.

title: Freelance Physics Expert with Python Expertise - AI Trainer
description_text:
Please submit your CV in English and indicate your level of English proficiency. 
Mindrift connects specialists with project-based AI opportunities for leading tech companies, focused on testing, evaluating, and improving AI systems. Participation is project-based, not permanent employment.
What this opportunity involves 
While each project involves unique tasks, contributors may: 
Design rigorous physics problems reflecting professional practice; 
Evaluate AI solutions for correctness, assumptions, and constraints; 
Validate calculations or simulations using Python (NumPy, Pandas, SciPy); 
Improve AI reasoning to align with industry-standard logic; 
Apply structured scoring criteria to multi-step problems.
What we look for 
This opportunity is a good fit for physicists with an experience in python open to part-time, non-permanent projects. Ideally, contributors will have: 
Degree in Physics or related fields, e.g. Engineering Physics, Thermodynamics, Statistical Mechanics, Optics and Acoustics, etc. 
3+ years of professional physics experience 
Strong written English (C1/C2) 
Strong Python proficiency for numerical validation 
Stable internet connection 
Professional certifications (e.g., CPhys, EurPhys, MInstP) and experience in international or applied projects are an advantage.
How it works 
Apply → Pass qualification(s) → Join a project → Complete tasks → Get paid
Project time expectations 
For this project, tasks are estimated to require around 10–20 hours per week during active phases, based on project requirements. This is an estimate, not a guaranteed workload, and applies only while the project is active. 
Payment 
Paid contributions, with rates up to $17/hour* 
Fixed project rate or individual rates, depending on the project 
Some projects include incentive payments 
*Note: Rates vary based on expertise, skills assessment, location, project needs, and other factors. Higher rates may be offered to highly specialized experts. Lower rates may apply during onboarding or non-core project phases. Payment details are shared per project.
ai_core_responsibilities: Contributors will design rigorous physics problems and evaluate AI solutions for correctness. They will also validate calculations or simulations using Python and improve AI reasoning.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a degree in Physics or related fields and at least 3 years of professional physics experience. Strong proficiency in Python and written English is also required.

title: Official Host
description_text:
Calling all truly AWESOME people! 
About Stranger Soccer
Stranger Soccer (www.strangersoccer.com) is a Singapore-based company experiencing explosive growth. In a few short years, after launching a revolutionary platform and Mobile App for on-demand football, the company has amassed over 50,000 registered users playing hundreds of games a week. It has solved the problem that football is the world's #1 sport, but is difficult for an individual to play. Stranger Soccer makes it as easy as going to the gym or for a jog. Browse. Book a slot. Show up and play. Today, it is the #1 way people play football and futsal in Singapore, and is rapidly expanding internationally via a license partner model, with locations in Australia, India, USA, UAE, and South Africa. 
Job Description
Official Hosts serve as the game facilitator as well as brand ambassadors. We are seeking Official Hosts to host games throughout the week and occasionally assist in other ad hoc duties. For this role, you should have great people skills, to make sure our users have a positive game experience from the moment they arrive till their departure.
Working Hours
Shifts will be assigned each week during the following timeframes:
Monday to Friday: 8 am – 1 pm, 4 – 9 pm, 6 - 11 pm
Saturday & Sunday: 8 am – 1 pm, 1 - 6 pm, 3 – 9 pm, 6 – 11 pm
Working Locations
North - Yishun
West - Jurong, Turf City, Bukit Panjang
Central - City Hall, Somerset, Serangoon, Farrer Park, Balestier
East - Changi, Paya Lebar, Tampines
Key Responsibilities
Be an ambassador of the Stranger Soccer brand at the games
Facilitate numerous football games around Singapore
Ensure an OUTSTANDING game experience from start to finish
Be ready to step in and play, to cover for any no show players or Hosts
Report issues back to Operations Management
Requirement
FUN outgoing personality
Understanding of and passion for football
Excellent people and communication skills
Previous experience in customer service is a plus
Males and Females welcome
To apply, please visit https://www.strangersoccer.com/official-host and fill in the application form there.
ai_core_responsibilities: Official Hosts act as game facilitators and brand ambassadors, ensuring users have a positive experience from arrival to departure. They are responsible for hosting numerous football games across Singapore and occasionally covering for absent players or hosts.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess a fun, outgoing personality and a strong understanding of and passion for football. Excellent people and communication skills are essential, with previous customer service experience being advantageous.
linkedin_org_slogan: Playing Football ⚽️: As easy as going for a jog. Singapore’s #1. Now accepting applications for international licensees.
linkedin_org_locations: 7 Temasek Boulevard, Suntec Tower One, Singapore, 038987, SG
linkedin_org_description:
3.5 billion people in 200 countries love football. Why don't more of them play? 

Stranger Soccer’s acclaimed app-enabled platform makes playing football (soccer, futbol) as easy as going for a jog. 

Singapore born, now open in 10+ cities with 100,000+ games run. Accepting applications for license partners to own and operate Stranger Soccer in key cities around the world.

Interested in bringing Stranger Soccer to your city or country? We are now accepting applications for license partners to own and operate Stranger Soccer in their city. Learn more here: www.strangersoccer.com

title: Software Engineer (Go) - Hybrid/Remote
description_text:
We are seeking Software Engineers (Go) to join our team in building and maintaining a set of microservices to support financial services use cases. As a Software Engineer (Go), you will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining highly scalable and reliable microservices, while also ensuring that they are integrated with Kafka for seamless communication between services.
Responsibilities 
Design and implement highly scalable and reliable services in GO language. 
Collaborate with team members to develop efficient and elegant solutions to complex problems. 
Work with Kafka for messaging and ensure that services are integrated with it. 
Ensure that all microservices are highly available and fault tolerant. 
Write high-quality and well-documented code. 
Ensure that code is tested, reviewed, and deployed in a timely and efficient manner. 
Continuously improve the performance and scalability of the microservices 
Qualifications
At least 5 years of professional experience in software development, with at least 3 years in GO language 
Experience with Kafka as a messaging system 
Strong understanding of microservice architecture, GraphQL and RESTful API design and development 
Experience with containerisation technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes 
Experience with databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB 
Experience with version control systems such as Github or Gitlab 
Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently. 
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills 
23 annual days holiday (Start and Fix at 23 days)
15 public holidays
provident fund up to 12%
Health insurance (including immediate family)
ai_remote_location_derived: Bangkok, Krung Thep Maha Nakhon, Thailand
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves designing, implementing, and maintaining highly scalable and reliable microservices written in Go language to support financial services use cases. Responsibilities also include ensuring seamless integration with Kafka for inter-service communication and maintaining high availability.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess at least five years of professional software development experience, with a minimum of three years specifically using the Go language. Essential qualifications include strong experience with Kafka, microservice architecture, API design (GraphQL/RESTful), and containerization technologies like Docker and Kubernetes.

ZILO is focused on transforming global transfer agency to create sustainable value for firms and the customers they serve. To achieve this, we started with a clean technology slate, a design-driven approach, and a commitment to put people first. ZILO's technology enables firms to replace legacy end-of-life systems, many of which were developed 30+ years ago, and slash costs, risk, and user friction along the way. 

Our founders, leadership, engineering, and product teams are highly experienced with successful track histories of pioneering innovation-driven businesses, products, and services. Our collective goal is to be the market leading solution in global asset and wealth management.

title: Revenue Accountant / Kế toán Doanh thu (HCM)
locations_alt_raw: Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
description_text:
1. Lập hóa đơn và quản lý doanh thu (70% khối lượng công việc)
Lập hóa đơn kịp thời và chính xác thông qua hệ thống nội bộ, đảm bảo tất cả các khoản thanh toán phù hợp với thỏa thuận hợp đồng
Hợp tác với bộ phận Kinh doanh, Điều phối dịch vụ và bộ phận Vận hành để xác minh khối lượng dịch vụ hàng tháng và xác nhận giá trị hóa đơn.
Quản lý các hoạt động chốt sổ cuối tháng một cách nghiêm túc theo đúng tiến độ của tập đoàn.
Thực hiện đối soát chi tiết hàng tháng giữa Doanh thu so với Danh mục hợp đồng và hiệu suất dịch vụ thực tế để xác định và giải quyết các sai lệch.
2. Tuân thủ, Điều chỉnh & Giải quyết tranh chấp (25% khối lượng công việc)
Cập nhật kiến thức về các Nghị định/Thông tư Thuế để đảm bảo mọi hoạt động ghi nhận doanh thu và xuất hóa đơn đều đúng quy định pháp luật
Quản lý quy trình xuất hóa đơn giảm, bao gồm việc soạn thảo và thu hồi Biên bản điều chỉnh, cũng như nộp Mẫu 04/SS-HĐĐT cho Cơ quan Thuế
Đóng vai trò là đầu mối liên hệ chính cho các tranh chấp về hóa đơn với khách hàng. Phân tích sâu nguyên nhân gốc rễ gây ra lỗi và phối hợp với các chi nhánh để đưa ra giải pháp chuyên nghiệp cho khách hàng.
Đảm bảo tất cả các khoản điều chỉnh và hủy bỏ hóa đơn đều tuân thủ nghiêm ngặt hệ thống phê duyệt nội bộ của công ty.
3. Nhiệm vụ khác (5% khối lượng công việc)
Duy trì và thúc đẩy các tiêu chuẩn chuyên nghiệp cũng như văn hóa của Rentokil Initial trong nội bộ đội ngũ.
Hỗ trợ Quản lý trực tiếp trong các dự án đặc biệt và các nhiệm vụ tài chính khác khi có yêu cầu.
- Tốt nghiệp Đại học, chuyên ngành Tài chính/Kế toán
- Có ít nhất 2 - 3 năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí tương đương và có kiến thức vững chắc về Thuế
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với MS Office và Google Workspace.
- Luôn hướng về khách hàng; kỹ năng phân tích, thuyết phục và giải quyết vấn đề tốt
- Có khả năng giao tiếp tiếng Anh cơ bản
- Chăm chỉ, cẩn thận & kiên nhẫn
- Có sức khỏe tốt và sẵn sàng làm thêm giờ.
Lương tháng 13, thưởng KPI hàng tháng, thưởng cuối năm
Bảo hiểm tai nạn 24/7, mức đóng bảo hiểm nguyên lương
Thưởng Lễ/ Tết/ Sinh nhật/ Thâm niên...
Môi trường Châu Âu, nhiều cơ hội phát triển nghề nghiệp, thăng tiến...

title: Technical Lead Customer Support
description_text:
Company Overview
Exeevo is a unified CRM solution for sales, marketing, medical, and service teams built on Microsoft technology. It is a global leader in customer relationship management (CRM) solutions that is purpose-built for the life sciences industry.
Our AI-powered, cloud-based platform unifies sales, marketing, medical, and service functions, enabling pharmaceutical, biotech, and medical device organizations to connect with stakeholders in transformative and innovative ways. By leveraging advanced technologies, Exeevo empowers Life Sciences companies to redefine how they engage with healthcare professionals, patients, and other key audiences, driving growth and delivering measurable business impact.
Exeevo has acquired by Valsoft Corporation Inc. (“Valsoft”), a Canadian company specializing in acquiring and developing vertical market software businesses.
Role Summary:
Technical Lead plays a significant role in the growth of Exeevo and our solution platforms. This position supports various roles and works closely with Customer Success, Product, Engineering and PMO. This role will be responsible for the successful management of the Operational Support Service that Exeevo provides to our customers, covering all technical aspects of our product. The successful candidate will act as the technical lead of support specialists and engineers to respond to and resolve incidents and service requests raised by the customers within the agreed SLAs. They will be the main point of contact for all service reporting and discussions with the customer, including identify opportunities for growth of the adoption of the Exeevo tools within the customer’s business. This can include the management of incremental updates to the solution from the core product or changes requested by the operational users.
At Exeevo we operate in a fast-paced development environment where everyone rolls up their sleeves to accelerate our products forward for our customers.
About Team:
The Customer Support team within Exeevo organization is responsible for ensuring best in class product quality and an exceptional customer experience in existing and future life science software technologies. The key pillars of Operations Manager include process quality, functional safety, product quality, continuous improvement, and quality analytics.
Key Responsibilities
The candidate will act as a SME for the CRM system. The individual will be responsible for supporting Microsoft Dynamics 365 CRM platform and the ideal candidate will have sound knowledge in Dynamics CRM entities, workflows, configurations, reporting, dashboards and security model. 
Support other team members in the knowledge transfer process so the whole team is able to understand and provide technical support for new features.
Ensuring the L2 Operational support team resolves incidents and requests from customer within the agree SLAs
Managing the collaboration between the L2 and L3 product teams to resolve more complex technical tickets as required
Act as the technical lead for the Operational Specialists on the team to guide them in how to resolve tickets raised by the customer. 
Take ownership to resolve the more complex technical tickets that the junior team members are not able to address.
Meeting with key stakeholders in the countries using the solution to review and follow up on their key incidents and requests
Building and maintaining good relationships with the customers
Manage the prompt resolution of escalated tickets from the customer either directly or via a member of the Ops team.
Take part in knowledge transfers from the product and projects team to understand in detail new features and functionality being delivered.
Liaison with business teams to receive details of business changes, new content, template updates etc.
Willing to visit client locations as and when required
Desired skills & Experience
5+ years’ experience of functional knowledge in Microsoft Dynamics CRM 
Experienced in User Configs, Data Import and Export. 
Experience in managing a team of support engineers
Experience with SaaS based technology solutions, preferably in Life Sciences
Experience working closely with Customer and Engineering teams delivering support services and changes to customers.
Experience presenting operational status at a detailed level and rollup level to the leadership team.
Management of customers, including in dealing with difficult situations.
Education:
Bachelor's degree or equivalent, IT and/or business focus
Preferably holding Microsoft Dynamics CRM certifications or currently studying for certifications. 
Other Requirements / Working Conditions
Able to prioritize work in a multi-tasking environment
Effective verbal, written and presentation skills
Able to meet tight deadlines, follow up on commitments, and act as needed
Highly organized with exceptional eye for detail
Strategic thinker who is action oriented with a high sense of urgency
Good track record of delivering results and achieving sales targets
Ability to work collaboratively and build strong cross functional relationships
ai_core_responsibilities: This role is responsible for the successful management of the Operational Support Service, acting as the technical lead for support specialists and engineers to resolve customer incidents within agreed SLAs. The individual will also serve as the main point of contact for service reporting and discussions, identifying opportunities for tool adoption growth within the customer's business.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have over 5 years of functional knowledge in Microsoft Dynamics CRM, including experience with user configurations, data import/export, and managing support engineers. A Bachelor's degree or equivalent is required, preferably with relevant Microsoft Dynamics CRM certifications.

As a leading player in vertical market software (VMS), Valsoft combines industry expertise with a unique buy-and-hold investment philosophy, managing a growing portfolio of companies that benefit from decentralized leadership and operational autonomy. We actively support our businesses, guiding them in their growth and evolution into market leaders. 

Headquartered in Montreal with a global presence, Valsoft is committed to building a legacy of excellence by prioritizing sustainable growth and operational efficiency. Our long-term vision, driven by entrepreneurial spirit and disciplined execution, ensures we create lasting value for our portfolio companies, their customers, and the industries they serve. For more information, visit valsoftcorp.com.
