Nous gérons un portefeuille croissant d'entreprises qui bénéficient d'un leadership décentralisé et d'une autonomie opérationnelle. Nous soutenons activement nos entreprises en les accompagnant dans leur croissance et leur évolution en leaders de leur secteur. 

Basée à Montréal et présente à l'échelle mondiale, Valsoft s'engage à bâtir un héritage d'excellence en priorisant la croissance durable et l'efficacité opérationnelle. Notre vision à long terme, portée par un esprit entrepreneurial et une exécution rigoureuse, nous permet de créer une valeur durable pour nos entreprises, leurs clients et les industries qu'elles desservent. Pour plus d'informations, visitez valsoftcorp.com.

title: Lead Generation Specialist
description_text:
About Huzzle
At Huzzle, we connect high-performing B2B sales professionals with global companies across the UK, US, Canada, Europe, and Australia. Our clients include startups, digital agencies, and tech platforms in industries like SaaS, MarTech, FinTech, and EdTech. We match top sales talent to full-time remote roles where they’re hired directly into client teams and provided ongoing support by Huzzle.
Role Type: Full-time
Engagement: Independent Contractor 
Job Summary
As the Demand Generation Lead, you’ll be responsible for designing, managing, and executing the full lead-to-call funnel. This is not a coordination or channel-specific role — it’s an end-to-end lead generation ownership position. You’ll lead strategy, oversee execution, and continually optimise for qualified discovery calls.
Your primary KPI: Qualified nonprofit discovery calls booked each month.
Key Responsibilities
Develop and execute a comprehensive lead generation strategy aligned with company goals. 
Own and optimise funnel architecture — offers, landing pages, lead magnets, and conversion paths. 
Write or direct high-converting copy for ads, landing pages, and email sequences. 
Manage and scale acquisition channels, including LinkedIn, SEO, paid ads, and retargeting. 
Collaborate with internal and external teams to ensure consistent messaging across touchpoints. 
Implement lead qualification processes to ensure only high-quality leads reach discovery stage. 
Monitor and analyse KPIs such as CPL, conversion rates, and booked call metrics, iterating weekly based on performance. 
Report on campaign performance and propose actionable insights for optimisation.
3+ years of experience in growth marketing, demand generation, or lead generation
Proven track record of designing and managing high-performing funnels (lead magnets, landing pages, retargeting). 
Deep understanding of B2B marketing and lead qualification systems. 
Strong copywriting skills with an eye for conversion-focused messaging. 
Experience working with CRM tools, analytics dashboards, and ad platforms. 
Data-driven mindset with the ability to balance creative and analytical thinking. 
Experience working with or marketing to nonprofits is a plus.
💻 Fully Remote: Work from anywhere with international teams
🚀 Career Growth: Join companies in SaaS, MarTech, and B2B services
🤝 Peer Community: Connect with high-performing sales professionals in our network
🧭 Ongoing Support: Receive guidance from Huzzle before and after placement
💰 Tailored Compensation: Salaries vary by client and candidate preference — we’ll match you with options that fit your goals
ai_core_responsibilities: The Demand Generation Lead will design, manage, and execute the full lead-to-call funnel, overseeing strategy and execution. The role focuses on optimizing for qualified discovery calls and includes developing lead generation strategies and managing acquisition channels.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have 3+ years of experience in growth marketing or lead generation and a proven track record of managing high-performing funnels. Strong copywriting skills and a deep understanding of B2B marketing and lead qualification systems are essential.
linkedin_org_slogan: ChatGPT for Jobs. 100k+ people use Huzzle monthly to find jobs, internships and advance their careers.
linkedin_org_description:
Huzzle is an early careers platform connecting students, societies, and employers. Starting out as a CRM for pre-professional student societies, Huzzle has evolved into the university career companion used by over 100,000 talents in the UK.

Research shows that students involved in student initiatives are 3X more hireable, and are rated 18% more career-ready by employers. 

On Huzzle, companies can access these talents by co-hosting events with over 1,000 diverse societies, promoting their roles, and through personalised direct messaging campaigns.

title: Customer Support & Back Office - Banking - Πρωινό ωράριο
description_text:
Η CQS διακρίθηκε ξανά!
Στη φετινή κατάταξη Top Employers 2025 του WhereWeWork.com — βάσει των αξιολογήσεων των ανθρώπων μας — πετύχαμε:
🏆 1η θέση στον κλάδο BPO & Services
🌟 2η θέση στη συνολική κατάταξη Top 50 στην Ελλάδα
Γίνε κι εσύ μέλος μιας ομάδας που διακρίνεται για το εργασιακό της περιβάλλον!
Λατρεύουμε την επικοινωνία και μας ενθουσιάζει οι υπηρεσίες που προσφέρουμε να διασφαλίζουν τη θετική εμπειρία των πελατών μας!
Προσφέρουμε ευκαιρίες εργασίας με αντικείμενο την τηλεφωνική εξυπηρέτηση πελατών, εκπροσωπώντας τα μεγαλύτερα brands στην Ελλάδα!
Μπες στην πιο δυναμική ομάδα που αποτελείται από 1850+ μέλη και εξέλιξε την καριέρα σου, αποκτώντας πολύτιμη εμπειρία και δεξιότητες.
Θα χαρούμε να σε έχουμε στην ομάδα μας ως Εκπρόσωπο Customer Support & Back Office για μεγάλο τραπεζικό οργανισμό!
Τι θα κάνεις;
Διαχείριση εισερχόμενων και εξερχόμενων κλήσεων (μέσω dialer) με οφειλέτες (όχι εισπρακτική δραστηριότητα) και τραπεζικά καταστήματα. 
Επικοινωνία με οφειλέτες σχετικά με: 
την πορεία αιτημάτων ρύθμισης 
τη συλλογή απαραίτητων δικαιολογητικών για την ολοκλήρωση των αιτημάτων τους 
Επικοινωνία με τραπεζικά καταστήματα για: 
ενημέρωση σχετικά με αιτήματα οφειλετών 
προγραμματισμό ραντεβού με οφειλέτες 
Back Office εργασίες (emails, καταχώρηση και διαχείριση αιτημάτων), οι οποίες αναλαμβάνονται σε μεταγενέστερο στάδιο, ανάλογα με την απόδοση και τις ανάγκες του τμήματος.
Έλα στην ομάδα μας αν:
⭐ Έχεις ταλέντο στην επικοινωνία 
💯 Εστιάζεις στην ποιοτική εξυπηρέτηση του πελάτη
🎯 Έχεις πάθος για την επίτευξη των στόχων σου
🙏 Ψάχνεις ένα σταθερό περιβάλλον εργασίας, με σταθερές απολαβές και ευκαιρίες επαγγελματικής ανέλιξης
🏆 Θέλεις να είσαι μέλος μιας ομάδας που συγκαταλέγεται στους Κορυφαίους Εργοδότες της Ελλάδας
Διαθέτεις επιπλέον:
Απολυτήριο Λυκείου
Εμπειρία στον τραπεζικό κλάδο
Καλή γνώση Η/Υ και της αγγλικής γλώσσας
Αξιοπιστία και υψηλό αίσθημα ευθύνης κατά την διαχείριση ευαίσθητων πληροφοριών
Υψηλό επίπεδο εχεμύθειας
Προσανατολισμό στο αποτέλεσμα
Ικανότητα επικοινωνίας & συνεργασίας
Η προϋπηρεσία σε θέση back office θα θεωρηθεί επιπρόσθετο προσόν
8 ώρες από το χρόνο σου, Δευτέρα - Παρασκευή
Τι σου προσφέρουμε:
Μηνιαίο μισθό πληρωτέο σε σταθερές ημερομηνίες, ανάλογο της προϋπηρεσίας που διαθέτεις, υπερωρίες, επιδόματα και ασφάλιση 
Επιβράβευση από την 1 μέρα με σταθερά bonus!
Σύμβαση εργασίας αορίστου χρόνου από την πρώτη στιγμή - για να μην σε απασχολεί η εργασιακή σου ασφάλεια
Oλοκληρωμένη έμμισθη εισαγωγική εκπαίδευση για να σε μεταμορφώσουμε σε expert
Πρόγραμμα Refer a Friend, με bonus!
Εύκολη πρόσβαση στα γραφεία μας μέσω ΜΜΜ
Συνεχή εκπαίδευση και υποστήριξη από τους έμπειρους εκπαιδευτές μας
Σημαντικές ευκαιρίες εξέλιξης και ανάπτυξης (Μήπως είσαι ο επόμενος Team Leader της ομάδας σου; 😉 )
Let’s have fun διαγωνισμούς για να μας αποκαλύψεις τα κρυφά σου ταλέντα και δράσεις εταιρικής υπευθυνότητας με τους Team Changers 
Ένα σούπερ υποστηρικτικό team που πιστεύει στη δύναμη της ομάδας
Για εμάς η διαφορετικότητα δεν είναι απλώς μια λέξη, αλλά ο ίδιος ο παλμός της προόδου και της καινοτομίας. Τα χρώματα της διαφορετικότητας μας εμπνέουν και μας ωθούν να δημιουργούμε ένα περιβάλλον εργασίας που είναι ανοιχτό, συμπεριληπτικό και χωρίς διακρίσεις. Είμαστε υπερήφανο μέλος της Χάρτας Διαφορετικότητας για Ελληνικές επιχειρήσεις. Στην ομάδα μας πιστεύουμε ότι η αξία κάθε ατόμου δεν σχετίζεται με τα χαρακτηριστικά του φύλου, της ηλικίας, της εθνικότητας, του σεξουαλικού προσανατολισμού, της αναπηρίας, των χρόνιων παθήσεων ή της θρησκείας.
Στην CQS δεν αναζητούμε τέλειους ανθρώπους. Χτίζουμε την ομάδα που ταιριάζει τέλεια σ’ εσένα.
ai_benefits: Permanent Employment Contract From Day One
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves managing inbound and outbound calls with debtors regarding settlement requests and required documentation, as well as communicating with bank branches for updates and appointment scheduling. Additionally, the position includes Back Office duties such as handling emails and managing requests, which will be assigned based on performance and departmental needs.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess strong communication talent, a focus on quality customer service, and a passion for achieving goals, seeking a stable work environment with growth opportunities. Essential requirements include a High School Diploma, reliability, high confidentiality, and computer/English proficiency, with banking experience or prior back office work being advantageous.
linkedin_org_locations: 56 D. Solomou Str, Nea Ionia, Athens 14234, GR
linkedin_org_description:
Η CQS είναι μια αμιγώς Ελληνική εταιρεία, η οποία συγκαταλέγεται στις ηγέτιδες επιχειρήσεις στoν κλάδο παροχής υπηρεσιών Διαχείρισης Πελατειακών Σχέσεων. 

Από την έναρξη λειτουργίας της συνεργάζεται με τις μεγαλύτερες εταιρείες και οργανισμούς που δραστηριοποιούνται στην Ελλάδα, με έμφαση στους κλάδους τηλεπικοινωνιών, τυχερών παιχνιδιών,  πληροφορικής,  ενέργειας, λιανικής, καθώς και τραπεζικού και ασφαλιστικού τομέα.

Παρέχει υπηρεσίες εξυπηρέτησης πελατών, υπηρεσίες γνώσης, διερεύνησης διατήρησης και ανάπτυξης υφιστάμενου πελατολογίου, υπηρεσίες απόκτησης νέων πελατών, ενώ παράλληλα αναπτύσσει και υποστηρίζει τεχνικές πωλήσεων σε ποικίλα κανάλια και προσεγγίσεις. 

Σήμερα απασχολεί περισσότερους από 1300 εργαζομένους σε όλη την Ελλάδα. Tα τελευταία έτη συγκαταλέγεται στους «Leading Employers in Greece», ανάμεσα στις 500 εταιρείες που δραστηριοποιούνται στην Ελλάδα με τον υψηλότερο αριθμό προσωπικού, ενώ βρίσκεται στις 100 εταιρείες με την υψηλότερη αύξηση προσωπικού.


Στη CQS η εταιρική κουλτούρα αποτελεί βασικό ανταγωνιστικό της πλεονέκτημα και για το λόγο έχει αναπτύξει δύο βασικά προγράμματα που ενισχύουν τόσο τη διάχυση εσωτερικά του οράματος και των αξιών της εταιρείας όσο και το κοινωνικό της αποτύπωμα.

Από το 2017, υλοποιεί ένα διευρυμένο πρόγραμμα ενεργειών για το προσωπικό της εταιρείας, με τον τίτλο ‘δημιουργούμε αξία μαζί με τους ανθρώπους μας’ ενώ παράλληλα, αναλαμβάνει κοινωνική δράση, στη βάση ενός συνεκτικού πρόγραμματος εταιρικής υπευθυνότητας, το οποίο αναλύεται σε δύο βασικούς άξονες: ευαισθητοποίηση και προσφορά.

title: In-house Lawyer (m/f/d)
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves providing end-to-end legal guidance throughout the product lifecycle, focusing on regulatory research, design reviews to ensure fairness and transparency, and final implementation across various jurisdictions. Key duties include serving as the subject matter expert on EU digital regulations like the DSA and AI Act, advising on Fintech/payments compliance, managing cross-border projects, and drafting commercial agreements.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have a minimum of three years of post-graduate experience gained in a law firm, e-commerce/marketplace, or technology environment, possessing deep knowledge of Consumer Law and EU digital regulations or solid Fintech expertise. Essential soft skills include being a great team player, comfortable working independently, strong communication, and practical application of GDPR and IP basics, with fluent English being mandatory.

title: (Fluent English) Technical Support Consultant (Remote)
description_text:
Who we are?
SupportYourApp is a global Support-as-a-Service leader, partnering with tech companies and industry leaders like MasterCard, Calm and MacPaw in 30+ countries since 2010 to deliver secure customer and technical support. We operate globally, supporting clients in 60 languages across diverse industries. So what if you had a chance to be a part of the world’s leading SaaS, software, or hardware solutions?
Join our community as a Technical Support Consultant today and thrive in a multicultural and multilingual environment while enjoying your home office. Unlock your potential by mastering new skills and achieving challenging goals in cooperation with our People First management approach. Excited? Let’s see what it takes.
What you will do:
Deliver outstanding technical support via chats and emails
Reproduce, investigate, and diagnose product issues using browser tools, logs, changelogs, and response statuses
Accurately distinguish between product bugs, user environment issues, and third-party platform limitations
Escalate incidents clearly, including impact, timeline, and reproduction steps
Manage ticket surges, identify recurring issues, and send proactive user communications
Collaborate closely with Engineering and Product teams, including participation in planning sessions
Run recurring support retrospectives and surface trends for prioritization and improvement
Create and maintain structured tickets and contribute to workflow improvements in Zendesk and Linear
Understand data migrations and associated risks (data loss, malformed data, parsing issues)
Proactively improve support processes, documentation, and internal systems
What you need to succeed in this role: 
Excellent English communication skills (at least C1 for both spoken and written)
At least 1–2 years of proven experience in a Technical Support role
Experience translating technical issues for non-technical users (high EQ)
Experience reproducing and troubleshooting complex technical issues using browser tools, logs, and changelogs
Solid understanding of engineering workflows, including releases, migrations, and potential user impact
Ability to clearly distinguish product bugs from user environment issues and third-party limitations
Experience escalating incidents with structured documentation (impact, timeline, reproduction steps)
Hands-on experience with Zendesk and Linear (or similar ticket-tracking systems)
Strong organizational skills, including tracking patterns, running retrospectives, and turning insights into actionable feedback
Personal computer (at least 8Gb of RAM) with a stable internet connection (minimum 50 Mbps–download and 40 Mbps–upload)
Will be a great plus:
Experience reading and interpreting logs (e.g., JSON) in monitoring tools such as Grafana
Familiarity with marketplace or reselling platforms
AI-first mindset, using AI tools to reduce repetitive work and improve support efficiency
Benefits: 
Flexible schedule
Opportunity to cooperate fully remotely
Inclusive international environment
Compensation in USD
Rewards for referring friends
Balance between project workload and personal time, but also – internal health policy
Responsive leadership interested in your development and long-lasting cooperation
Greenhouse conditions for self-development
A culture built on trust, with no time-tracking requirements

title: Project Data Manager - Europe
description_text:
Lead clinical data. Partner with sponsors. Deliver quality trials.
We are looking for a Project Data Manager (PDM) to join our Data Management A-team at Allucent. As a Project Data Manager, you are responsible for leading and coordinating end-to-end data management activities across clinical trials and biometrics stand-alone projects, ensuring high-quality, compliant, and timely delivery of clinical data.
At Allucent™, we are dedicated to helping small and mid-sized biopharmaceutical companies efficiently navigate the complex world of clinical trials to bring life-changing therapies to patients in need across the globe.
The role
You will lead and oversee data management activities, timelines and finances of the Allucent Data Management (DM) department. 
Manage and coordinate DM deliverables from database design & set-up, through cleaning and reporting to database locking, ensuring that the completeness, accuracy and consistency of clinical data meet the quality standards and regulatory requirements for analysis and reporting. 
You are responsible for the overall coordination and management of Data Management/Biostats standalone projects, large and complex trials and/or multiple projects belonging to one client. 
You work closely with sponsors, vendors, and internal teams to ensure data is collected, cleaned, reviewed, and delivered to the highest standards. You combine hands-on clinical data management expertise with strong project leadership, keeping timelines, scope, quality, and budgets on track.
Your main responsibilities will be:
Lead and oversee Data Management activities from database design through to database lock
Act as the primary point of contact for Data Management for sponsors, vendors, and internal stakeholders
Plan, coordinate, and deliver biometrics and clinical data projects according to scope, timelines, and contract
Establish and maintain clear communication, escalation, and risk management plans
Lead internal and external meetings, including Kick-Off Meetings and sponsor discussions
Manage vendors and support vendor selection and oversight where required
Oversee project budgets, financial health, and monthly status reporting
Supervise and support junior Data Management team members, ensuring quality and development
You are an experienced clinical data management professional who enjoys taking ownership, working closely with clients, and bringing structure to complex studies. 
You will bring the following skills and experience: 
Life science, healthcare degree and/or combination of education and experience 
Minimum 8 years of relevant work experience in Clinical Data Management or related experience within Biometrics 
Minimum 8 years of relevant experience in related clinical trials environment 
Thorough knowledge and understanding of ICH-GCP, 21CFR11 data privacy (GDPR/HIPPA) guidelines and awareness of local/regional requirements 
Experience as DM Lead on several studies and experience in covering all phases of a clinical study (start up, conduct and database lock). Worked on multiple indications and clinical phases (I-IV) 
Thorough understanding of EDC (Medidata or Veeva) database components and experience in technical data management practices (validation plans, testing, and documentation 
Experienced in CDISC conventions, i.e., CDASH, TAUG models and hands on experience implementing these models 
Confidence working directly with sponsors and external vendors
A collaborative mindset and the ability to mentor and guide others
Strong communication skills in English and comfort working in a global environment
Comprehensive benefits package per location
Competitive salaries per location 
Departmental Study/Training Budget for furthering professional development 
Flexible Working hours (within reason) 
Leadership and mentoring opportunities 
Participation in our enriching Buddy Program as a new or existing employee
Internal growth opportunities and career progression 
Financially rewarding internal employee referral program 
Access to online soft-skills and technical training via GoodHabitz and internal platforms
Eligibility for our Spot Bonus Award Program in recognition of going above and beyond on projects 
Eligibility for our Loyalty Award Program in recognition of loyalty and commitment of longstanding employees
About Allucent
Our mission is to help bring new therapies to light. When you work at Allucent, that means applying your unique skill set, expertise, and knowledge to build partnerships with our clients in their pursuit to develop new, life-improving treatments.
If you're passionate about helping customers develop new pharmaceuticals and biologics; have an entrepreneurial spirit; and ready to join other science, business, and operations leaders, we would love to get to learn more about how we can help each other grow.
Apply now!
Ready to grow your data management career while contributing to meaningful research to Allucent, apply today or reach out to Yael Kokernoot, Sr. Manager Talent Acquisition (yael.kokernoot@allucent.com) for more information.
Disclaimers:
*Our in-office work policy encourages a dynamic work environment, prescribing 2 days in office per week for employees within reasonable distance from one of our global offices. 
“The Allucent Talent Acquisition team manages the recruitment and employment process for Allucent (US) LLC and its affiliates (collectively “Allucent”). Allucent does not accept unsolicited resumes from third-party recruiters or uninvited requests for collaboration on any of our open roles. Unsolicited resumes sent to Allucent employees will not obligate Allucent to the future employment of those individuals or potential remuneration to any third-party recruitment agency. Candidates should never be submitted directly to our hiring managers, employees, or human resources.”
#LI-YK1 #LI-remote

Participation in our enriching buddy program as a new or existing employee
Internal growth opportunities and career progression
Financially rewarding internal employee referral program
Access to online soft-skills and technical training via GoodHabitz and internal platforms
Eligibility for our spot bonus award program in recognition of going above and beyond on projects
Eligibility for our loyalty award program in recognition of loyalty and commitment of longstanding employees
ai_core_responsibilities: The Project Data Manager is responsible for leading and coordinating end-to-end data management activities across clinical trials and biometrics stand-alone projects, ensuring high-quality, compliant, and timely delivery of clinical data. This includes overseeing data management activities, timelines, and finances, from database design through to lock, while managing deliverables from internal teams and vendors.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must be experienced clinical data management professionals with a minimum of 8 years of relevant experience in Clinical Data Management or Biometrics within a clinical trials environment. Thorough knowledge of ICH-GCP, 21CFR11 data privacy guidelines, EDC systems, and CDISC conventions is required, along with strong project leadership and client-facing skills.

title: Electronics Engineer. TLT Elecronics
description_text:
We are currently inviting an Electronics Engineer to join our growing team and work withwork with wide scope of ODM projects, ranging from initial product electronics design to the creation of custom testing stands in R&D department, in our manufacturing and R&D environment in Vilnius and Molėtai.
At TLT, we are committed to continuous growth and staying at the forefront of manufacturing innovation. Our 55-hectare high-tech manufacturing park, equipped with advanced automation and robotics, enables us to turn even the most complex electronics and plastics ideas into real, impactful products used around the world.
We foster a strong, winning culture where collaboration, ownership, and ambition drive real results. By working closely across engineering, project management, and manufacturing teams, we create solutions that truly make a difference.
At TLT, we invest in our people. Here, you’ll have the opportunity to strengthen your project management expertise, expand your technical understanding, and grow professionally while working on challenging ODM projects from concept to production.
Ready to create impact? Join us and become part of something remarkable.
In this position, you will:
Analyze and evaluate customer projects, helping to estimate workload and timelines.
Work with customer Altium source files.
Design electronic prototypes and test them according to provided technical requirements.
Design electronic test boards for customer product testing.
Select testing equipment for electronics manufacturing (FCT, ICT).
Adapt products for mass production (DFM, DFT).
Work with laboratory measurement equipment.
Build functional prototypes using development kits (dev kits).
Generate required manufacturing documentation for electronics projects.
Collaborate closely with electronics engineers, mechanical engineers, and embedded systems developers.
Are passionate about designing, debugging, measuring, and analytical thinking.
Are proficient with ECAD tools (Altium).
Have hands-on design experience and have delivered at least one fully working project.
Understand connection schematics of popular MCUs (STM, NXP, ESP32, MSP430).
Are familiar with communication protocols (UART, I²C, SPI, RS485, CAN, etc.).
Prepare manufacturing documentation with attention to detail.
Understand and can apply analog, digital, and RF circuits in schematics.
Hold a higher education degree in Electronics Engineering (or a related field).
Are methodical and structured in your work.
We care about your emotional and physical well-being by providing additional health insurance, which includes psychologist consultations.
We celebrate achievements and have fun together at team-building events, summer festivals, and other important occasions.
We offer generous bonuses for those participating in our referral program.
We provide additional bonuses for successfully implemented projects
We reward long-term commitment and dedication.
We surprise you with a day off and gifts on your birthday, as well as special treats during various celebrations.
Salary
Recognizing the candidate's efforts and experience, we offer a competitive salary that reflects your skills and expertise. The salary for this position ranges from €18/hour - €25/hour (€ 3 00– 4 200 per month) before taxes, depending on your experience and competence.
The employment contract states a fixed hourly salary before taxes.
ai_benefits: Day off and gifts on your birthday
ai_core_responsibilities: The engineer will analyze customer projects, design electronic prototypes and custom test boards, and adapt products for mass production, working across the entire ODM project lifecycle from concept to production. Key tasks include selecting testing equipment, building functional prototypes, and generating all necessary manufacturing documentation for electronics projects.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess a higher education degree in Electronics Engineering or a related field, be methodical in their work, and demonstrate proficiency with ECAD tools like Altium, having delivered at least one fully working project. Essential technical knowledge includes understanding analog, digital, and RF circuits, as well as common communication protocols and MCU connection schematics.

title: Dutch Speaking Customer Support for Mobile Banking Services Department Greece
description_text:
🏦 Exciting Career Opportunity! Patrique Mercier Recruitment ES is looking for a Dutch Speaking Customer Support representative for the Mobile Banking Services Department in Greece! If you are fluent in Dutch and have a passion for technology and finance, this is the perfect role for you.
In this important position, you will provide support to Dutch-speaking customers using our mobile banking services, assisting them with their inquiries and ensuring they have a seamless experience. Be part of a modern banking landscape while enjoying the vibrant culture and lifestyle of Greece. If you’re ready to elevate your career in the banking sector, we want to hear from you!

Your Responsibilities
Deliver exceptional customer support to Dutch-speaking clients through various communication channels, including phone, email, and chat.
Assist customers with inquiries about our mobile banking services, providing information and resolving issues efficiently.
Maintain accurate records of customer interactions in our CRM system.
Collaborate with team members to achieve service level goals and enhance overall customer satisfaction.
Participate in ongoing training to stay updated on mobile banking trends and product features.
Fluency in Dutch (written and spoken) is essential.
A strong interest in technology and banking services.
Previous experience in customer support or in the banking/financial industry is a plus but not mandatory.
Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills.
A proactive team player with a customer-focused mentality.
Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
Willingness to embrace a new environment and relocate to Greece if necessary.
Monthly Performance Bonus
Fully Paid Relocation Package ( Flight, Transfer and 2 weeks Hotel )
Private Health Insurance
2 Extra Salaries Per Year
Support In Finding Accommodation After Hotel
Fully Paid Training
Free Greek lessons
And More...
ai_benefits: Support In Finding Accommodation After Hotel
ai_core_responsibilities: The representative will deliver exceptional customer support to Dutch-speaking clients via phone, email, and chat regarding mobile banking services, assisting with inquiries and resolving issues efficiently. Responsibilities also include maintaining accurate CRM records and collaborating with the team to meet service goals.
ai_requirements_summary: Essential requirements include fluency in Dutch (written and spoken) and a strong interest in technology and banking services. Previous customer support or financial industry experience is beneficial but not mandatory; strong problem-solving and communication skills are necessary.
linkedin_org_slogan: The leading recruitment agency for candidates who want to work in their own language. Relocation paid by our clients!
linkedin_org_description:
Patr​ique Mercier Recruitment is the leading agency for candidates seeking jobs in their native language, in other countries. We specialize in the following industries: social media, gaming, healthcare, retail & e-retail, travel, automotive, financial, insurance, energy, and telecommunications.

 

Our recruitment process ensures that we match the best candidates with the right employers. Contact us to learn more about how we can help you find your dream job abroad."

title: Junior Marketing Designer
locations_alt_raw: Kuala Lumpur, Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
description_text:
Design visual assets for B2B content, including: 
Blog headers, diagrams, and simple infographics 
LinkedIn posts and carousels aimed at a professional audience 
Write, publish, and update blog content (long-form articles, insights) 
Create and schedule LinkedIn posts that support: 
Brand awareness 
Product, service, or insight-led content 
Turn complex or technical topics into clear, easy-to-understand visuals 
Support basic performance tracking (engagement, clicks, reach) and content iteration
0–2 years' experience in marketing, design, or content 
Comfortable using design tools such as: 
Canva, Figma, Adobe Illustrator, or similar 
Basic copywriting or editing skills for professional / business audiences 
Strong attention to detail and layout 
Interest in B2B marketing, branding, or content strategy
Fluency in English, both written and verbal communication
Why join Chemin
Work directly with a small, fast-moving team shaping the frontiers of AI safety and governance in Asia Pacific.
Build portfolio defining work across brand, thought leadership, and partnerships
Hybrid, flexible, and supportive culture with room to grow.

linkedin_org_description:
Singapore-headquartered TDCX provides transformative digital CX solutions, enabling world-leading and disruptive brands to acquire new customers, to build customer loyalty, and to protect their online communities. 

TDCX helps clients achieve their customer experience aspirations by harnessing technology, human intelligence, and its global footprint. It serves clients in fintech, gaming, technology, travel and hospitality, digital advertising and social media, streaming and e-commerce. TDCX’s expertise and strong footprint in Asia have made it a trusted partner for clients, particularly high-growth, new economy companies, looking to tap the region’s growth potential.

TDCX’s commitment to delivering positive outcomes for our clients extends to its role as a responsible corporate citizen. Its Corporate Social Responsibility program focuses on positively transforming the lives of its people, its communities, and the environment.

TDCX employs more than 19,000 employees across 34 campuses globally, specifically in Brazil, Colombia, Hong Kong, India, Japan, Malaysia, Mainland China, Philippines, Türkiye, Singapore, South Korea, Spain, Thailand, Türkiye, and Vietnam. For more information, please visit www.tdcx.com.

title: Sales Assistant - Kamatero
description_text:
Στην SINSAY, μέλος της LPP S.A., αναζητάμε ΠΩΛΗΤΡΙΕΣ – ΠΩΛΗΤΕΣ για το νέο μας κατάστημα που πρόκειται να ανοίξει σύντομα στο Καματερό, επί της οδού Λεωφ. Φυλής 165!
ΣΧΕΤΙΚΑ ΜΕ ΕΜΑΣ
Η LPP S.A. είναι μία από τις μεγαλύτερες εταιρείες μόδας στην Κεντρική και Ανατολική Ευρώπη. Η εταιρεία δραστηριοποιείται σταθερά στην Πολωνία και στο εξωτερικό για περισσότερα από 26 χρόνια, και με επιτυχία ανταποκρίνεται στις απαιτήσεις της αγοράς στον τομέα των ενδυμάτων. 
Η LPP S.A. διαχειρίζεται 5 Brands μόδας: Reserved, Cropp, House, Mohito και Sinsay, που το κάθε ένα απευθύνεται σε διαφορετικό κοινό.
Η εταιρεία απαριθμεί πάνω από 2.200 καταστήματα στο δίκτυό της και επιπλέον διαθέτει και καταστήματα on-line για το κάθε της Brand. 
Έχει παρουσία σε 40 χώρες και απασχολεί πάνω από 30.000 υπαλλήλους στα γραφεία και στα καταστήματά της. 
· Καθημερινή αναπλήρωση των προϊόντων στο κατάστημα.
· Συμμετοχή στην διεξαγωγή των παραλαβών και στην οργάνωση της αποθήκης.
· Φροντίδα για την διατήρηση της σωστής εικόνας του καταστήματος, σύμφωνα με τις οδηγίες του visual merchanting της εταιρείας. 
· Τάξη και καθαριότητα στον χώρο του καταστήματος και της αποθήκης.
· Πολύ καλή γνώση των προϊόντων που πουλάμε στο κατάστημα και του αποθέματος στην αποθήκη.
· Οργάνωση των πακέτων του e shop.
· Πολύ καλή επικοινωνία με τους πελάτες με στόχο την δημιουργία σχέσης εμπιστοσύνης και την αύξηση των πωλήσεων.
· Συμμετοχή στην επίτευξη των στόχων του καταστήματος.
· Εργασία στο ταμείο.
· Εφαρμογή των εταιρικών λειτουργιών και διαδικασιών.
· Ανταγωνιστικό πακέτο αποδοχών.
· Παροχή διατακτικών (meal vouchers) σε όλους τους υπαλλήλους του καταστήματος.
· Ομαδικό πρόγραμμα ιδιωτικής ασφάλισης υγείας.
· Γραμμή Υποστήριξης των Εργαζομένων (HELPP).
· Εκπτώσεις για αγορές στα καταστήματα της LPP στην Ελλάδα.
· Συνεχής κατάρτιση και εκπαίδευση.
· Προοπτικές για ανάπτυξη και εξέλιξη μέσα στην εταιρεία.
· Ευχάριστο εργασιακό περιβάλλον.
Η LPP GREECE που εδρεύει στην Αθήνα, στην οδό Άγγελου Πυρρή 5 & Ευήνου, ως Υπεύθυνος Επεξεργασίας επεξεργάζεται τα προσωπικά σας δεδομένα αποκλειστικά στο μέτρο που απαιτείται κατά την διαδικασία συνέντευξης και ενδεχόμενης πρόσληψης και έχει λάβει όλα τα κατάλληλα τεχνικά και οργανωτικά μέτρα για την προστασία των προσωπικών δεδομένων σας σύμφωνα με την ισχύουσα ελληνική νομοθεσία και τις διατάξεις του Γενικού Κανονισμού Προστασίας Προσωπικών Δεδομένων (ΕΕ) 2016/679. Τα δεδομένα που γνωστοποιείτε στην LPP GREECE μέσω της αίτησης σας θα διατηρούνται για τυχόν μελλοντική χρήση για χρονικό διάστημα ενός έτους από τη λήψη τους προς αξιοποίηση μελλοντικής πρόσληψης. Για την εκπλήρωση των ανωτέρω αναφερομένων σκοπών επεξεργασίας των προσωπικών σας δεδομένων η LPP GREECE δύναται να γνωστοποιεί ή να διαβιβάζει προσωπικά δεδομένα που μας έχετε δώσει σε θυγατρικές ή συνδεδεμένες με την LPP GREECE εταιρείες. Μπορείτε ανά πάσα στιγμή με αίτημα σας στην LPP GREECE να ασκήσετε τα δικαιώματα που προβλέπει ο Κανονισμός, συμπεριλαμβανομένου του δικαιώματος ενημέρωσης και πρόσβασης, διόρθωσης, διαγραφής, περιορισμού της επεξεργασίας, φορητότητας και του δικαιώματος αντίρρησης ως προς την επεξεργασία μέσω email στη διεύθυνση privacygreece@lpp.com , αλλά και να απευθυνθείτε στην Αρχή Προστασίας Προσωπικών Δεδομένων (www.dpa.gr).
ai_benefits: Discounts for purchases at LPP stores in Greece
Development and growth prospects within the company
ai_core_responsibilities: Responsibilities include daily product replenishment, participating in stock receiving and warehouse organization, and maintaining the store's appearance according to visual merchandising guidelines. The role also involves excellent customer communication aimed at building trust and increasing sales, as well as operating the cash register.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess very good knowledge of the products sold and warehouse stock, coupled with very good communication skills for customer interaction and sales growth. The role requires participation in achieving store targets and adhering to corporate functions and procedures.
linkedin_org_locations: Aggelou Pyrri 5, 2nd floor, Athens, Attiki 11527, GR
linkedin_org_description:
LPP S.A. is one of the largest fashion companies in Central and Eastern Europe. The company has been operating steadily in Poland and abroad for more than 26 years, successfully meeting market demands in the field of clothing.
LPP S.A. manages 5 fashion brands: Reserved, Cropp, House, Mohito, and Sinsay, each of which addresses a different audience.
The company lists over 2.200 stores in its network and additionally has online stores for each of its Brands. It has presence in 40 countries. 
We are ambitious, which means that we are constantly looking for new challenges and striving to improve. 
Our biggest strength is our team, which today consists of more than 30.000 talented people in our offices and stores. Their passion motivates us to still have the energy and courage to reach for more.

title: Freelance Mathematics Expert with Python Expertise - AI Trainer
description_text:
Please submit your CV in English and indicate your level of English proficiency. 
Mindrift connects specialists with project-based AI opportunities for leading tech companies, focused on testing, evaluating, and improving AI systems. Participation is project-based, not permanent employment.
What this opportunity involves 
While each project involves unique tasks, contributors may: 
Design rigorous mathematics problems reflecting professional practice; 
Evaluate AI solutions for correctness, assumptions, and constraints; 
Validate calculations or simulations using Python (NumPy, Pandas, SciPy); 
Improve AI reasoning to align with industry-standard logic; 
Apply structured scoring criteria to multi-step problems.
What we look for 
This opportunity is a good fit for mathematicians with an experience in python open to part-time, non-permanent projects. Ideally, contributors will have: 
Degree in Mathematics or related fields, e.g. Algebra, Calculus, Number theory, etc. 
3+ years of professional mathematics experience 
Strong written English (C1/C2) 
Strong Python proficiency for numerical validation 
Stable internet connection 
Professional certifications (e.g., CMME, SAS Certifications, CAP) and experience in international or applied projects are an advantage.
How it works 
Apply → Pass qualification(s) → Join a project → Complete tasks → Get paid
Project time expectations 
For this project, tasks are estimated to require around 10–20 hours per week during active phases, based on project requirements. This is an estimate, not a guaranteed workload, and applies only while the project is active. 
Payment 
Paid contributions, with rates up to $10/hour* 
Fixed project rate or individual rates, depending on the project 
Some projects include incentive payments 
*Note: Rates vary based on expertise, skills assessment, location, project needs, and other factors. Higher rates may be offered to highly specialized experts. Lower rates may apply during onboarding or non-core project phases. Payment details are shared per project.
ai_core_responsibilities: Contributors will design rigorous mathematics problems and evaluate AI solutions for correctness. They will also validate calculations using Python and improve AI reasoning.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a degree in Mathematics or related fields and at least 3 years of professional experience. Strong proficiency in Python and written English is required.
linkedin_org_slogan: Be the “I” in AI with Mindrift. Work from anywhere on groundbreaking AI projects
linkedin_org_description:
Welcome to Mindrift — a space where innovation meets opportunity. We’re a pioneering platform dedicated to advancing the field of artificial intelligence through collaborative online projects. Our focus lies in creating data for generative AI, offering a unique chance for freelancers to contribute to AI development from anywhere, at any time.

At Mindrift, we believe in the power of collective intelligence to shape the future of AI. Our platform allows users to dive into a variety of tasks — ranging from creating training prompts for AI models to refining AI responses for greater relevance.

Let’s build the future of AI together, one task at a time.

title: Specialist Pulmonologist - Leading Government Healthcare Facility
description_text:
SearchPlus HR is a premier human resources consulting firm dedicated to aligning top medical professionals with esteemed healthcare institutions. We are currently seeking a highly skilled Specialist Pulmonologist to join a leading government healthcare facility. This position offers an incredible opportunity to work in an environment that prioritizes patient care and community health.
As a Specialist Pulmonologist, you will be responsible for diagnosing and treating a range of respiratory diseases and conditions in patients. You will perform comprehensive evaluations, leverage advanced diagnostic technologies, and collaborate with a multidisciplinary team to ensure optimal patient outcomes. Your expertise will play a vital role in enhancing the health and quality of life of patients within the community.
Key Responsibilities
Conduct thorough assessments of patients with respiratory conditions, including detailed medical histories and physical examinations.
Order and interpret diagnostic tests such as pulmonary function tests, bronchoscopy, and imaging studies.
Diagnose and manage various pulmonary disorders, including asthma, COPD, interstitial lung disease, and lung cancer.
Formulate and implement personalized treatment plans, including pharmacological and non-pharmacological interventions.
Educate patients and their families about respiratory health, disease prevention, and management strategies.
Collaborate with other healthcare professionals to develop integrated treatment plans and ensure comprehensive care.
Participate in continuing medical education and stay abreast of the latest advancements in pulmonology and therapeutic techniques.
Extensive experience in diagnosing and treating various pulmonary conditions.
Strong knowledge of current pulmonology practices, treatment protocols, and diagnostic tools.
Ability to effectively order, analyze, and interpret pulmonary diagnostic tests.
Excellent communication skills, with the ability to engage and educate patients and their families.
Demonstrated ability to work collaboratively within a team-focused healthcare environment.
Attention to detail and strong organizational skills in handling patient caseloads.
Critical thinking skills are required for addressing complex medical issues in respiratory health.
Private Health Insurance
Training & Development
Performance Bonus
ai_core_responsibilities: As a Specialist Pulmonologist, you will diagnose and treat a range of respiratory diseases and conditions in patients. You will conduct thorough assessments, order diagnostic tests, and collaborate with a multidisciplinary team to ensure optimal patient outcomes.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have extensive experience in diagnosing and treating various pulmonary conditions. Strong knowledge of current pulmonology practices and excellent communication skills are essential.

title: Business Operations Manager, Data Center
locations_alt_raw: Kuala Lumpur, Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
description_text:
The Business Operations Manager, Data Center is a senior technical and operational leader responsible for shaping and delivering end-to-end data center managed services. The role provides Subject Matter Expertise (SME) in data center operations and bridges commercial strategy with operational execution. It drives new business acquisition through technical pre-sales leadership, oversees day-to-day service delivery for customer environments, and leads the implementation of data center service offerings.
As the organization’s SME on data center operations, resiliency, and compliance, the role ensures that services are scalable, commercially viable, and aligned with customer requirements.
1. Business Acquisition & Pre-Sales Leadership
Act as the technical authority during sales pursuits for data center operators, colocation providers, and enterprise facilities.
Partner with Sales to shape winning service propositions and managed services models.
Lead technical discovery workshops, site assessments, and operational maturity reviews for prospective customers.
Define service scope, operating models, staffing structures, and tooling requirements.
Develop Statements of Work (SOW), service catalogs, and pricing inputs.
Present service capabilities, operating frameworks, and transformation roadmaps to customer stakeholders.
Assess risks, dependencies, and transition strategies for new contracts.
2. Data Center Operations Leadership
Provide executive oversight of on-site and remote DC operations teams supporting customers.
Ensure service delivery meets contractual SLAs, KPIs, and regulatory obligations.
Govern operational processes including:
Facilities operations (power, cooling, space)
Remote hands and smart hands services
Incident, problem, and change management
Vendor and subcontractor coordination
Capacity planning and asset lifecycle management
Act as escalation point for major incidents and service-impacting events.
Drive continuous service improvement initiatives and operational maturity programs.
Build and mentor high-performing technical teams; define training and certification pathways.
Ensure compliance with industry standards such as Uptime Institute, ISO 27001/22301, SOC, and local regulatory requirements.
3. Service Implementation & Transition Leadership
Lead onboarding and mobilisation of new data center service contracts.
Design and execute transition plans from incumbent providers or in-house teams.
Establish governance structures, reporting cadence, and operational dashboards.
Implement operational processes, runbooks, and tooling platforms (e.g., DCIM, ITSM).
Validate readiness through service acceptance testing and operational drills.
Manage go-live activities and stabilization periods.
Ensure knowledge transfer and documentation is completed and maintained.
Align delivery teams, partners, and subcontractors during ramp-up.
Strategic & Advisory Responsibilities
Shape the firm’s data center managed services portfolio and go-to-market strategy.
Identify new service offerings such as:
Edge DC operations
Sustainability and energy optimization serviceso
Automation and monitoring platforms
AI-driven operations
Provide market intelligence on DC trends, regulatory shifts, and emerging technologies.
Act as trusted advisor to customers on operational transformation, resilience planning, and cost optimization.
Support alliance and partner development with OEMs, hyperscalers, and facilities vendors.
Proven experience managing data center or mission-critical operations minimally with 10 years in DC sector as Team Lead/ SDM/ Head of Data Center Operations/ DC Cluster Manager
Experience leading 24x7 operational teams
Clear decision-making and communication skills
Deep experience in Tier III/IV data center operations and service delivery.
Strong pre-sales and customer-facing leadership capability.
Proven track record in mobilizing large-scale managed services engagements.
Expertise in:
Electrical & Mechanical systems (UPS, generators, chillers)
BMS/DCIM platforms
ITSM frameworks (ITIL)
Resiliency and business continuity planning
Commercial acumen—understanding contract structures, margins, and risk management.
Excellent stakeholder management and executive communication skills.
Core Data Center and Facilities Certifications
Uptime Institute Certifications 
BICSI Data Center Certifications (DCDC or DCCS) 
Schneider Electric Data Center Certified Associate or Professional (DCCA or DCCP) 
IT Service Operations and Governance
ITIL 4 (Managing Professional or Strategic Leader) from AXELOS
ISO 20000 Foundation or Lead Implementer
Business Continuity, Risk, and Resilience
ISO 22301 Business Continuity Management
Certified Data Centre Risk Professional (CDCRP) 
Energy, Safety, and Sustainability
ISO 50001 Energy Management 
NEBOSH or equivalent safety certification
What We Offer:
Competitive salary and commission structure
Comprehensive benefits package
Opportunities for professional growth and development
A supportive and collaborative work environment
Please state clearly your past work experience, reasons for leaving each role, past and expected remuneration.
We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
Thank you in advance for your interest.
ai_benefits: Opportunities for professional growth and development
ai_core_responsibilities: This senior leadership role is responsible for shaping and delivering end-to-end data center managed services, acting as the Subject Matter Expert (SME) bridging commercial strategy with operational execution. Key duties include leading technical pre-sales, overseeing day-to-day service delivery, driving continuous improvement, and ensuring compliance across data center operations.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess a minimum of 10 years of experience in the DC sector, including leadership roles managing 24x7 mission-critical operations, particularly within Tier III/IV environments. Essential expertise includes electrical/mechanical systems, DCIM/BMS platforms, ITIL, resiliency planning, and strong commercial acumen.
linkedin_org_slogan: Completing your Technology Chain.
linkedin_org_locations: 1 Commonwealth Lane, #07-22/23, One Commonwealth, Singapore, 149544, SG
linkedin_org_description:
The best of Xcellink today is the result of having evolved through more than 2 decades of Enterprise ICT Operations management experience and capabilities development as a trusted vendor partner to high-growth global companies, established local enterprises and government-linked corporations. We have delivered over SGD$150 million worth of operations management services in the past decade to support our clients in their strategic IT deployments.

Our long-standing ICT services experience is wide-ranging in the domains of Data Centre Operations, Network Command Centre Operations, IT Security Operations, Technical Helpdesk Services, Onsite Field Services, Applications Support, and IT Assets Staging Operations. We have helped our clients set up operational teams and work processes from scratch, and have transitioned and offshored service delivery operations to countries like Malaysia, Philippines, Indonesia and India. We have been well-entrusted by our clients for multiple resource-intensive & mission-critical IT delivery projects where we deployed up to several hundreds of IT professional manpower within each of such projects. 

Because we love Technology and care about the development of our People, we will always evolve our business and create new services to serve our stakeholders better as the market landscape transforms. Today, Xcellink offers more than just Enterprise ICT operations management services in our portfolio;  We have our analytical and technology savvy Enterprise Solutions team bringing great business software and process innovation ideas to CXOs, and we have a resourceful team of Talent Search specialists to serve our talent-conscious clientele for their Technology and Tech-savvy hiring needs.

Significant experience in clinical prosthodontics, particularly in a government or public health setting
Strong skills in case management and interdisciplinary collaboration
Excellent communication abilities for effective patient interactions and teamwork
Commitment to high ethical standards in patient care and professional practice
Willingness to engage in community outreach and education initiatives
Ability to adapt to diverse patient needs and work in a fast-paced environment
Good salary packages plus other standard benefits like accommodation, annual air tickets, family benefits, medical insurance, etc.

title: HR Recruiter
description_text:
Thank you considering the Recruiter position at Reveal Health Tech. We are an Early stage it Start up based in USA and India,focusing on leveraging technology to deliver trans formative healthcare solutions.
Key Responsibilities: 
• Sourcing candidates using variety of search methods to build robust pipeline 
• Screening and Evaluating Candidates 
• Managing Hiring Process (interviews, selection, offer, negotiation and closing) 
• Developing and Implementing Recruiting Strategies
• Building Relationships with hiring managers, candidates and other stakeholders 
• Ensuring positive candidate experience 
• Managing onboarding candidates 
• Performing reference checks as needed 
• Continuously upgrading to stay abreast of recruiting trends and best practices 
Skills & Qualifications 
• Very strong communication and interpersonal skills 
• Excellent time management 
• Knowledge of recruitment principles and practices
• Problem solving and critical thinking skills 
• Master’s degree in human resources, Business Administration or related field
• 5+ years of recruiting experience 
• Experience with applicant tracking systems and recruitment tools
• Proficiency in Microsoft Office
• Familiarity with wide variety of sourcing avenues 
• Healthcare hiring experience and exposure is a plus
Benefits
What do you get in return?
· Be part of a growing/amazing team - A great opportunity to be part of 0-1 of a new age technology services & product engineering company in a risk-adjusted environment with high upside for initial members.
· Trust over control - We believe in strong business fundamentals and possess vision for scale from day 1. Truly, people are our greatest winners and we want to make sure your full potential is met in the job.
· Numerous on-the-job-and-beyond learning opportunities - We already have a curated list of courses you can dive right in!
· Industry best compensation and benefits
Next Steps
· Send us your updated CV - if you can mention how you have enriched your previous organisation in a cover letter, that would be great!
· If we find your profile suitable, we will have our Talent personnel to reach out to you to understand your profile/interests and how best we can align mutually.
· Finally, you would have a chat with our founder to understand more about us and see if this is the right next career move!
Reveal HealthTech welcomes all applicants regardless of race, gender, orientation, sexual identity, economic class, ability, disability, age, religious beliefs or disbeliefs, or status. We believe that different perspectives and backgrounds are what make a company flourish and we welcome everyone.
ai_benefits: Great opportunity to be part of 0-1 of a new age technology services & product engineering company
ai_core_responsibilities: The recruiter will be responsible for sourcing candidates using various methods to build a robust pipeline, screening, evaluating, and managing the entire hiring process from interviews to closing offers. Key duties also include developing recruiting strategies, building stakeholder relationships, ensuring a positive candidate experience, and managing onboarding.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess very strong communication and interpersonal skills, excellent time management, and knowledge of recruitment principles and practices, along with problem-solving abilities. A Master’s degree in human resources or a related field and 5+ years of recruiting experience are required, along with experience using applicant tracking systems.
linkedin_org_locations: New York City, New York, US
linkedin_org_description:
Reveal HealthTech provides specialized engineering, clinical model, and strategy support to healthcare organizations.

Our mission is to maximize patient health by removing technology as a constraint to healthcare innovation.

title: Consultant Plastic Surgeon - Reputed private Healthcare Group
description_text:
SearchPlus HR is proud to represent a reputed private healthcare group seeking a Consultant Plastic Surgeon to join their distinguished team. This esteemed organization is dedicated to providing exceptional medical care, and they are looking for a seasoned Plastic Surgeon who is passionate about enhancing patient outcomes and experiences.
As a Consultant Plastic Surgeon, you will be responsible for performing an array of cosmetic and reconstructive procedures, providing comprehensive evaluations, and delivering personalized care to your patients. With a focus on innovation and quality, you will collaborate with a team of skilled professionals to ensure the highest standard of treatment.
If you are an experienced Plastic Surgeon seeking to make a substantial impact in a leading healthcare setting, we encourage you to apply and become an integral part of this prestigious group.
Key Responsibilities:
Perform a variety of cosmetic surgeries, including breast augmentation, facelifts, tummy tucks, and aesthetic enhancements.
Conduct reconstructive surgeries for trauma, congenital anomalies, and post-cancer reconstruction.
Evaluate patients’ medical histories and aesthetic goals to develop customized surgical plans.
Provide non-surgical treatments, including Botox, fillers, and skin rejuvenation procedures.
Educate patients thoroughly regarding all options, risks, and expected outcomes.
Deliver pre-operative and post-operative care, ensuring patient comfort and safety.
Maintain accurate medical records and ensure adherence to best practices and regulatory standards.
Stay informed about advancements in plastic surgery techniques and technologies.
Work closely with multidisciplinary teams to optimize patient care and outcomes.
Uphold the highest level of professional ethics and integrity in the practice of medicine.
Extensive experience in both cosmetic and reconstructive surgeries.
Sound knowledge of the latest techniques and advancements in plastic surgery.
Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills for patient engagement and teamwork.
Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
Commitment to excellence in patient care and safety.
Ability to manage multiple cases effectively in a fast-paced environment.
Dedication to ongoing professional development and education.
Strong ethical standards and a compassionate approach to patient care.
Working Time is Full Time.
Benefits are Good Monthly Salary + Incentives + Standard family benefits like accommodation, Air ticket, Medical insurance, and Education allowance.
ai_core_responsibilities: As a Consultant Plastic Surgeon, you will perform cosmetic and reconstructive procedures while providing comprehensive evaluations and personalized care. You will also collaborate with a team to ensure high standards of treatment and patient outcomes.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have extensive experience in both cosmetic and reconstructive surgeries, along with a sound knowledge of the latest techniques in plastic surgery. Exceptional communication skills and a commitment to patient care and safety are essential.

title: Technical Support Analyst
locations_alt_raw: Surry Hills, New South Wales, Australia
counties_derived: Council of the City of Sydney
description_text:
LegalVision is a market disruptor in the commercial legal services industry. Our mission is to power the success of every business by delivering legal support that is proactive, affordable and commercial. Our innovative membership model and custom-built technology allow our team to provide a faster, better quality and more cost-effective client experience. 
If you are excited about the prospect of being a part of an innovative and growing business that offers challenging work in a fast-paced scale-up environment, then joining our team will be the perfect career move!
The Opportunity
We are looking for a savvy Technical Support Analyst to come on board to keep the LV machine humming. You will provide first and second level support regarding hardware and software issues to our employees located in our Sydney head office, as well as those who work remotely across Australia and New Zealand. You need to be proactive, resourceful and self-motivated, and passionate about providing excellent customer service. 
No two days will look the same, but may include network configuration/troubleshooting, documenting and re-designing processes to make them more efficient, setting up hardware for new starters, investigating and resolving system bugs and troubleshooting our VoIP system. 
Examples of the platforms and systems we use include:
Windows and macOS laptops (blended)
Google Workspace
Twilio
JIRA
Meraki
MS Office
Given the nature of this role, you will be expected to be in the office full time. 
The Ideal Candidate
On the technical side of things, you have 1-2 years of experience working in a similar role which will enable you to hit the ground running.
This is a front line role, so excellent customer service skills and a personable demeanour are a must. You feel confident about picking up the phone or having a face to face discussion with a team member to understand and solve the problem at hand.
Experience in troubleshooting and thinking out of the box will serve you well in this role. 
You demonstrate a genuine interest in IT and a commitment to further develop your knowledge in the field through on-the-job learning.
You take pride in the quality of your work, can operate effectively in an autonomous manner but also enjoy being part of a team. 
You have excellent time management skills, allowing you to prioritise tasks in a logical manner.
You have unrestricted work rights in Australia. 
The Perks
Fast-paced environment with exposure to interesting projects as well as BAU work.
Annual budget to spend on external learning opportunities.
Earn additional ‘LV Leave’ days, plus paid birthday leave, volunteering leave, and parental leave.
Regular team socials, drinks and team lunches.
Fun and relaxed office environment in Surry Hills, super close to Central Station.
How to Apply
If this opportunity sounds exciting, we’d love to hear from you!
Applications will close as soon as the right candidate is found, so it is best to apply as soon as possible.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Technical Support Analyst will provide first and second level support for hardware and software issues to employees located in the Sydney head office and those working remotely across Australia and New Zealand. Responsibilities may include network configuration, process improvement documentation, hardware setup for new starters, resolving system bugs, and troubleshooting the VoIP system.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates need 1-2 years of experience in a similar role, excellent customer service skills, and a personable demeanor suitable for a front-line position. The ideal applicant must be proactive, resourceful, self-motivated, demonstrate a genuine interest in IT, possess excellent time management skills, and have unrestricted work rights in Australia.
linkedin_org_slogan: Powering the success of every business by delivering legal support that is proactive, affordable and commercial.
linkedin_org_locations: 241 Commonwealth St, Surry Hills, New South Wales 2010, AU
430 Little Collins St, Melbourne CBD, Victoria 3000, AU
127 Creek St, Brisbane CBD, Queensland 4000, AU
221 St Georges Terrace, Level 29, Perth CBD, Western Australia 6000, AU
9 Great Ancoats St, The Express Building, Manchester, United Kingdom M4 5AD, GB
linkedin_org_description:
LegalVision is a commercial law firm built for SMEs and in-house teams. Across Australia, New Zealand and the United Kingdom, we provide unlimited legal support through a fixed-fee membership and use custom tech to deliver fast, affordable and business-friendly legal advice.

Our experienced lawyers help with the full-range of SME legal needs including employment law, contracts, intellectual property, corporate matters, disputes, business structuring, M&A, capital raising, regulatory, data protection, tax, immigration and day to day legal needs.

Our commitment to transforming legal services has been widely recognised. LegalVision has earned prestigious accolades, including being named Asia-Pacific’s fastest-growing law firm (Financial Times) and Law Firm of the Year (Australasian Law Awards), solidifying our position as a global trailblazer in the legal industry.

title: Field Sales Representative
description_text:
Omada.ai is hiring ambitious field sales reps to introduce local businesses to our AI marketing platform. This isn't just another commission-only gig—we pay you $25/hour guaranteed ($1,000/week at 40 hours) PLUS $200 commission for every customer you close.
We're looking for people who can walk into a local business, start a conversation, and close deals. If you're ready to earn serious income while building real sales skills, this is your shot.
What You'll Do:
Walk into local businesses (salons, restaurants, gyms, coffee shops, pet stores) in your area and show them how Omada.ai can handle their marketing while they focus on running their business.
Your day looks like this:
Map your route – pick 10-20 businesses in a walkable area
Walk in and start the conversation – "Hi, I'm with Omada.ai. Who handles your social media?"
Show a 10-minute demo right there on your phone/tablet
Offer a 14-day free trial – no risk for them
Follow up a few days later – when they convert, you earn $200
Most reps close their first deal within the first week.

title: Freelance Mathematics Expert with Python Expertise - AI Trainer
description_text:
Please submit your CV in English and indicate your level of English proficiency. 
Mindrift connects specialists with project-based AI opportunities for leading tech companies, focused on testing, evaluating, and improving AI systems. Participation is project-based, not permanent employment.
What this opportunity involves 
While each project involves unique tasks, contributors may: 
Design rigorous mathematics problems reflecting professional practice; 
Evaluate AI solutions for correctness, assumptions, and constraints; 
Validate calculations or simulations using Python (NumPy, Pandas, SciPy); 
Improve AI reasoning to align with industry-standard logic; 
Apply structured scoring criteria to multi-step problems.
What we look for 
This opportunity is a good fit for mathematicians with an experience in python open to part-time, non-permanent projects. Ideally, contributors will have: 
Degree in Mathematics or related fields, e.g. Algebra, Calculus, Number theory, etc. 
3+ years of professional mathematics experience 
Strong written English (C1/C2) 
Strong Python proficiency for numerical validation 
Stable internet connection 
Professional certifications (e.g., CMME, SAS Certifications, CAP) and experience in international or applied projects are an advantage.
How it works 
Apply → Pass qualification(s) → Join a project → Complete tasks → Get paid
Project time expectations 
For this project, tasks are estimated to require around 10–20 hours per week during active phases, based on project requirements. This is an estimate, not a guaranteed workload, and applies only while the project is active. 
Payment 
Paid contributions, with rates up to $42/hour* 
Fixed project rate or individual rates, depending on the project 
Some projects include incentive payments 
*Note: Rates vary based on expertise, skills assessment, location, project needs, and other factors. Higher rates may be offered to highly specialized experts. Lower rates may apply during onboarding or non-core project phases. Payment details are shared per project.
ai_core_responsibilities: Contributors will be responsible for designing rigorous mathematics problems reflecting professional practice and evaluating AI solutions for correctness, assumptions, and constraints. They will also validate calculations using Python and improve AI reasoning to align with industry-standard logic.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess a degree in Mathematics or related fields and have at least 3 years of professional mathematics experience, coupled with strong written English (C1/C2) and proficiency in Python for numerical validation. This is a part-time, non-permanent project opportunity.
linkedin_org_slogan: Be the “I” in AI with Mindrift. Work from anywhere on groundbreaking AI projects
linkedin_org_description:
Welcome to Mindrift — a space where innovation meets opportunity. We’re a pioneering platform dedicated to advancing the field of artificial intelligence through collaborative online projects. Our focus lies in creating data for generative AI, offering a unique chance for freelancers to contribute to AI development from anywhere, at any time.

At Mindrift, we believe in the power of collective intelligence to shape the future of AI. Our platform allows users to dive into a variety of tasks — ranging from creating training prompts for AI models to refining AI responses for greater relevance.

Let’s build the future of AI together, one task at a time.

title: Field Sales Representative
description_text:

title: Project Advisor
locations_derived: City of Moreton Bay, Queensland, Australia
description_text:
Our client URGENTLY requires a Project Advisor for 9 months + Contract in Buderim.
The Project Advisor will provide high level administrative and project support services to project team members to ensure the efficient administration of the project, and adherence to organizational policies and procedures. You will contribute to the overall success of a project by ensuring that the project team has the resources, information, and support they need to perform their work effectively. 
Responsibilities include:
Organise meetings, prepare agendas, distribute relevant documents, minute meetings, track items, and follow-up on updates to actions/decisions.
Manage the document control and review process, draft and update project management plans, manage project-related documentation and maintaining records/archives.
Coordination of tender and procurement processes.
Develop project schedules and regularly monitor and report on project budget, schedule / and resource usage against key performance measures.
Government experience would be highly advantageous.
Top $'s Paid !
Long Term Contract extensions available !
CV must be uploaded to be considered.
For other future opportunities that are not currently listed, please go to: https://apply.workable.com/quality-people/j/0E5BBAAE57/
Quality People is committed to all forms of workforce diversity and encourages applications from men and women of all ages and cultures, including indigenous Australians, and Veterans.
Www.QualityPeople.com.au

title: Freelance Mathematics Expert with Python Expertise - AI Trainer
description_text:
Please submit your CV in English and indicate your level of English proficiency. 
Mindrift connects specialists with project-based AI opportunities for leading tech companies, focused on testing, evaluating, and improving AI systems. Participation is project-based, not permanent employment.
What this opportunity involves 
While each project involves unique tasks, contributors may: 
Design rigorous mathematics problems reflecting professional practice; 
Evaluate AI solutions for correctness, assumptions, and constraints; 
Validate calculations or simulations using Python (NumPy, Pandas, SciPy); 
Improve AI reasoning to align with industry-standard logic; 
Apply structured scoring criteria to multi-step problems.
What we look for 
This opportunity is a good fit for mathematicians with an experience in python open to part-time, non-permanent projects. Ideally, contributors will have: 
Degree in Mathematics or related fields, e.g. Algebra, Calculus, Number theory, etc. 
3+ years of professional mathematics experience 
Strong written English (C1/C2) 
Strong Python proficiency for numerical validation 
Stable internet connection 
Professional certifications (e.g., CMME, SAS Certifications, CAP) and experience in international or applied projects are an advantage.
How it works 
Apply → Pass qualification(s) → Join a project → Complete tasks → Get paid
Project time expectations 
For this project, tasks are estimated to require around 10–20 hours per week during active phases, based on project requirements. This is an estimate, not a guaranteed workload, and applies only while the project is active. 
Payment 
Paid contributions, with rates up to $30/hour* 
Fixed project rate or individual rates, depending on the project 
Some projects include incentive payments 
*Note: Rates vary based on expertise, skills assessment, location, project needs, and other factors. Higher rates may be offered to highly specialized experts. Lower rates may apply during onboarding or non-core project phases. Payment details are shared per project.
ai_core_responsibilities: Contributors will design rigorous mathematics problems and evaluate AI solutions for correctness. They will also validate calculations using Python and improve AI reasoning.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a degree in Mathematics or related fields and at least 3 years of professional mathematics experience. Strong proficiency in Python and written English is also required.
linkedin_org_slogan: Be the “I” in AI with Mindrift. Work from anywhere on groundbreaking AI projects
linkedin_org_description:
Welcome to Mindrift — a space where innovation meets opportunity. We’re a pioneering platform dedicated to advancing the field of artificial intelligence through collaborative online projects. Our focus lies in creating data for generative AI, offering a unique chance for freelancers to contribute to AI development from anywhere, at any time.

At Mindrift, we believe in the power of collective intelligence to shape the future of AI. Our platform allows users to dive into a variety of tasks — ranging from creating training prompts for AI models to refining AI responses for greater relevance.

Let’s build the future of AI together, one task at a time.

title: Field Sales Representative
description_text:
Omada.ai is hiring ambitious field sales reps to introduce local businesses to our AI marketing platform. This isn't just another commission-only gig—we pay you $25/hour guaranteed ($1,000/week at 40 hours) PLUS $200 commission for every customer you close.
We're looking for people who can walk into a local business, start a conversation, and close deals. If you're ready to earn serious income while building real sales skills, this is your shot.
What You'll Do:
Walk into local businesses (salons, restaurants, gyms, coffee shops, pet stores) in your area and show them how Omada.ai can handle their marketing while they focus on running their business.
Your day looks like this:
Map your route – pick 10-20 businesses in a walkable area
Walk in and start the conversation – "Hi, I'm with Omada.ai. Who handles your social media?"
Show a 10-minute demo right there on your phone/tablet
Offer a 14-day free trial – no risk for them
Follow up a few days later – when they convert, you earn $200
Most reps close their first deal within the first week.
What You'll Earn:
Base: $25/hour ($1,000/week full-time)
Commission: $200 per closed customer
Payment: Bi-monthly via direct deposit
Real Income Potential:
5 customers/month: $5,000/month ($4K base + $1K commission)
10 customers/month: $6,000/month ($4K base + $2K commission)
20 customers/month: $8,000/month ($4K base + $4K commission)
Top performers: $10K+/month
Commission is uncapped. The more you close, the more you make.
What We're Looking For:
✅ Comfortable talking to people – You're not afraid to walk into a business and start a conversation
✅ Willing to hustle – You understand that sales is about volume and consistency
✅ Coachable – You'll follow our proven system and improve every week
✅ Reliable – You show up, work your territory, and follow through
✅ Self-motivated – You don't need someone looking over your shoulder
Bonus if you have:
✓ Sales experience (insurance, real estate, merchant services, B2B)
✓ Experience working with small business owners
✓ Your own transportation or live in a walkable area with high business density
No degree required. No sales experience required. If you can hold a conversation and you're willing to work, we'll teach you everything else.
About Omada.ai
We're an AI-powered marketing platform built specifically for small businesses. We handle social media, email marketing, ads, and reputation management—so business owners can stop being reluctant marketers and get back to what they do best.
We're venture-backed, growing fast, and building a team of sales reps who want to win.
This Role Is Perfect For:
Career changers exploring sales with guaranteed income
College grads who want to build real skills and real money
Experienced sales reps looking for better comp structure
Hustlers who know they can sell but need the right opportunity
Anyone tired of purely commission-based work but still wants upside
Ready to Start?
Apply now. We're hiring in select cities and looking for people who are ready to get started immediately.
Must reside in the United States
Phone/laptop/tablet and internet access
Ability to commit 40 hours per week
Reliable transportation or walkable territory
Comfortable working independently
Equal opportunity employer.
1099 independent contractor position.
$25/hour base + $200 commission per closed customer.
ai_core_responsibilities: The representative will visit local businesses such as salons, restaurants, and gyms to introduce and demonstrate the Omada.ai AI marketing platform, aiming to secure 14-day free trial sign-ups which lead to closed customer deals.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must be comfortable initiating conversations with business owners, possess a strong willingness to hustle and maintain consistency, and be coachable to follow the established sales system. No formal degree or prior sales experience is required, provided the applicant can hold a conversation and is willing to work.
